+/**
+ * Property Management Functions
+ */
+
+/**
+ * Enhanced Property Modal System
+ */
+class PropertyModalManager {
+    constructor() {
+        this.loadingIndicators = new Map();
+        this.modalCache = new Map();
+        this.retryAttempts = 3;
+        this.retryDelay = 1000;
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Show loading indicator with unique ID
+     */
+    showLoadingIndicator(message = 'Loading...', id = null) {
+        const loadingId = id || `loading_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
+
+        // Remove existing indicator if present
+        if (this.loadingIndicators.has(loadingId)) {
+            this.hideLoadingIndicator(loadingId);
+        }
+
+        const loadingHtml = `
+            <div id="${loadingId}" class="property-loading-indicator position-fixed top-50 start-50 translate-middle" style="z-index: 2000;">
+                <div class="card shadow-lg border-0">
+                    <div class="card-body text-center p-4">
+                        <div class="spinner-border text-primary mb-3" role="status" style="width: 3rem; height: 3rem;">
+                            <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
+                        </div>
+                        <div class="fw-medium text-dark">${message}</div>
+                        <div class="small text-muted mt-2">Please wait...</div>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+                <div class="position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 bg-dark opacity-25" style="z-index: -1;"></div>
+            </div>
+        `;
+
+        document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', loadingHtml);
+        const indicator = document.getElementById(loadingId);
+        this.loadingIndicators.set(loadingId, indicator);
+
+        return loadingId;
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Hide loading indicator
+     */
+    hideLoadingIndicator(loadingId) {
+        if (this.loadingIndicators.has(loadingId)) {
+            const indicator = this.loadingIndicators.get(loadingId);
+            if (indicator && indicator.parentNode) {
+                indicator.remove();
+            }
+            this.loadingIndicators.delete(loadingId);
+        }
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Fetch data with retry logic
+     */
+    async fetchWithRetry(url, options = {}, attempts = this.retryAttempts) {
+        for (let i = 0; i < attempts; i++) {
+            try {
+                const response = await fetch(url, {
+                    ...options,
+                    headers: {
+                        'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+                        'Accept': 'application/json',
+                        ...options.headers
+                    }
+                });
+
+                if (!response.ok) {
+                    if (response.status === 404) {
+                        throw new Error(`Property not found (${response.status})`);
+                    } else if (response.status >= 500) {
+                        throw new Error(`Server error (${response.status})`);
+                    } else if (response.status === 403) {
+                        throw new Error(`Access denied (${response.status})`);
+                    } else {
+                        throw new Error(`Request failed (${response.status})`);
+                    }
+                }
+
+                const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type');
+                if (contentType && contentType.includes('application/json')) {
+                    return await response.json();
+                } else {
+                    return await response.text();
+                }
+            } catch (error) {
+                console.warn(`Attempt ${i + 1} failed:`, error.message);
+
+                if (i === attempts - 1) {
+                    throw error;
+                }
+
+                // Wait before retrying (exponential backoff)
+                await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, this.retryDelay * Math.pow(2, i)));
+            }
+        }
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Ensure modal template exists
+     */
+    async ensureModalTemplate(modalId, templateUrl = null) {
+        let modalEl = document.getElementById(modalId);
+
+        if (!modalEl && templateUrl) {
+            try {
+                const htmlResponse = await fetch(templateUrl, {
+                    method: 'GET',
+                    headers: {
+                        'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+                        'Accept': 'text/html'
+                    }
+                });
+
+                if (htmlResponse.ok) {
+                    const htmlText = await htmlResponse.text();
+                    const temp = document.createElement('div');
+                    temp.innerHTML = htmlText;
+                    const injected = temp.querySelector(`#${modalId}`);
+
+                    if (injected) {
+                        document.body.appendChild(injected);
+                        modalEl = injected;
+                        console.log(`Modal template ${modalId} injected successfully`);
+                    }
+                }
+            } catch (e) {
+                console.warn(`Failed to load modal template for ${modalId}:`, e);
+            }
+        }
+
+        return modalEl;
+    }
+
+    /**
+     * Show error modal
+     */
+    showErrorModal(title, message, details = null) {
+        const errorModalId = 'propertyErrorModal';
+        let errorModal = document.getElementById(errorModalId);
+
+        if (!errorModal) {
+            const errorModalHtml = `
+                <div class="modal fade" id="${errorModalId}" tabindex="-1" aria-hidden="true">
+                    <div class="modal-dialog">
+                        <div class="modal-content">
+                            <div class="modal-header bg-danger text-white">
+                                <h5 class="modal-title">
+                                    <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
+                                    <span class="error-title">Error</span>
+                                </h5>
+                                <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
+                            </div>
+                            <div class="modal-body">
+                                <div class="error-message mb-3"></div>
+                                <div class="error-details collapse">
+                                    <hr>
+                                    <h6>Technical Details:</h6>
+                                    <pre class="bg-light p-2 rounded small"></pre>
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                            <div class="modal-footer">
+                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target=".error-details">
+                                    Show Details
+                                </button>
+                                <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" data-bs-dismiss="modal">
+                                    Close
+                                </button>
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+            `;
+            document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', errorModalHtml);
+            errorModal = document.getElementById(errorModalId);
+        }
+
+        // Update content
+        errorModal.querySelector('.error-title').textContent = title;
+        errorModal.querySelector('.error-message').textContent = message;
+
+        if (details) {
+            errorModal.querySelector('.error-details pre').textContent = details;
+            errorModal.querySelector('.error-details').classList.remove('d-none');
+        } else {
+            errorModal.querySelector('.error-details').classList.add('d-none');
+        }
+
+        // Show modal
+        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(errorModal);
+        modal.show();
+    }
+}
+
+// Create global instance
+window.PropertyModalManager = new PropertyModalManager();
+
+/**
+ * Enhanced View property details in modal
+ */
+async function viewPropertyModal(propertyId) {
+    if (!propertyId) {
+        console.error('Property ID is required');
+        showNotification('Property ID is required', 'error');
+        return;
+    }
+
+    // Get modal element
+    const modalEl = document.getElementById('propertyViewModal');
+    if (!modalEl) {
+        console.error('Property view modal template not found');
+        showNotification('Modal template not available', 'error');
+        return;
+    }
+
+    try {
+        // Show loading state
+        if (typeof showModalLoading === 'function') {
+            showModalLoading();
+        }
+
+        // Show modal
+        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalEl, {
+            backdrop: 'static',
+            keyboard: true
+        });
+        modal.show();
+        activePropertyModalId = Number(propertyId);
+        updatePropertyModalUrl(activePropertyModalId);
+
+        // Validate property ID
+        if (!Number.isInteger(Number(propertyId)) || Number(propertyId) <= 0) {
+            throw new Error('Invalid property ID format');
+        }
+
+        // Fetch property data
+        const response = await fetch(`/properties/${propertyId}`, {
+            method: 'GET',
+            headers: {
+                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+                'Accept': 'application/json'
+            }
+        });
+
+        if (!response.ok) {
+            if (response.status === 404) {
+                throw new Error('Property not found');
+            } else if (response.status === 403) {
+                throw new Error('Access denied');
+            } else if (response.status >= 500) {
+                throw new Error('Server error');
+            } else {
+                throw new Error(`HTTP ${response.status}: ${response.statusText}`);
+            }
+        }
+
+        const data = await response.json();
+
+        if (!data || !data.property) {
+            throw new Error('Property data not found in response');
+        }
+
+        // Populate modal with data
+        if (typeof populatePropertyViewModal === 'function') {
+            populatePropertyViewModal(data.property);
+        } else {
+            throw new Error('populatePropertyViewModal function not available');
+        }
+
+        // Add event listeners for modal events
+        modalEl.addEventListener('shown.bs.modal', () => {
+            console.log(`Property ${propertyId} modal shown successfully`);
+            // Focus on first tab for accessibility
+            const firstTab = modalEl.querySelector('[data-bs-toggle="tab"]');
+            if (firstTab) firstTab.focus();
+        }, { once: true });
+
+        modalEl.addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', () => {
+            console.log(`Property ${propertyId} modal hidden`);
+            activePropertyModalId = null;
+            updatePropertyModalUrl(null);
+        }, { once: true });
+
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error('Error in viewPropertyModal:', error);
+
+        // Show appropriate error message
+        let errorMessage = 'Failed to load property details';
+
+        if (error.message.includes('not found') || error.message.includes('404')) {
+            errorMessage = 'Property not found. It may have been deleted or you may not have permission to view it.';
+        } else if (error.message.includes('Server error') || error.message.includes('500')) {
+            errorMessage = 'Server error occurred. Please try again later.';
+        } else if (error.message.includes('Access denied') || error.message.includes('403')) {
+            errorMessage = 'You do not have permission to view this property.';
+        } else if (error.message.includes('Invalid property ID')) {
+            errorMessage = 'Invalid property ID provided.';
+        } else if (error.message.includes('Network')) {
+            errorMessage = 'Network error. Please check your connection and try again.';
+        }
+
+        // Show error in modal
+        if (typeof showModalError === 'function') {
+            showModalError(errorMessage);
+        } else {
+            // Fallback: show notification and close modal
+            showNotification(errorMessage, 'error');
+            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(modalEl);
+            if (modal) {
+                modal.hide();
+            }
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Edit property in modal
+ */
+async function editProperty(propertyId) {
+    if (!propertyId) {
+        console.error('Property ID is required');
+        return;
+    }
+
+    let loadingIndicator;
+    try {
+        // Show loading indicator
+        loadingIndicator = showLoadingIndicator('Loading property for editing...');
+
+        // Single-fetch contract: fetch modal HTML once and inject.
+        const response = await fetch(`/properties/${propertyId}/edit`, {
+            method: 'GET',
+            headers: {
+                'Accept': 'text/html'
+            }
+        });
+
+        if (!response.ok) {
+            throw new Error(`Failed to load property for editing: ${response.status}`);
+        }
+
+        const htmlText = await response.text();
+        const temp = document.createElement('div');
+        temp.innerHTML = htmlText;
+        const fetchedModal = temp.querySelector('#propertyEditModal');
+        if (!fetchedModal) {
+            throw new Error('Property edit modal markup not found in response');
+        }
+
+        const existingModal = document.getElementById('propertyEditModal');
+        if (existingModal) {
+            existingModal.remove();
+        }
+        document.body.appendChild(fetchedModal);
+
+        // Hide loading indicator
+        hideLoadingIndicator(loadingIndicator);
+
+        const editModalEl = document.getElementById('propertyEditModal');
+        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(editModalEl);
+        modal.show();
+        bindPropertyEditForm(propertyId);
+
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error('Error loading property for editing:', error);
+        showNotification('Failed to load property for editing', 'error');
+    } finally {
+        hideLoadingIndicator(loadingIndicator);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Share property modal
+ */
+async function shareProperty(propertyId) {
+    if (!propertyId) {
+        console.error('Property ID is required');
+        return;
+    }
+
+    let loadingIndicator = null;
+    try {
+        // Show loading indicator
+        loadingIndicator = showLoadingIndicator('Loading sharing options...');
+
+        // Fetch sharing data
+        const response = await fetch(`/properties/${propertyId}/share`, {
+            method: 'GET',
+            headers: {
+                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+                'Accept': 'application/json'
+            }
+        });
+
+        if (!response.ok) {
+            throw new Error(`Failed to load sharing options: ${response.status}`);
+        }
+
+        const data = await response.json();
+
+        // Hide loading indicator
+        hideLoadingIndicator(loadingIndicator);
+
+        if (data.sharing) {
+            // Populate and show share modal
+            populatePropertyShareModal(data.sharing);
+            const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('propertyShareModal'));
+            modal.show();
+        } else {
+            throw new Error('Sharing data not found');
+        }
+
+    } catch (error) {
+        console.error('Error loading sharing options:', error);
+        showNotification('Failed to load sharing options', 'error');
+        hideLoadingIndicator(loadingIndicator);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Populate property view modal with data
+ */
+function populatePropertyViewModal(property) {
+    const modal = document.getElementById('propertyViewModal');
+    if (!modal) return;
+
+    // Update modal content with property data
+    const updateElement = (selector, value, isHtml = false) => {
+        const element = modal.querySelector(selector);
+        if (element) {
+            if (isHtml) {
+                element.innerHTML = value;
+            } else {
+                element.textContent = value;
+            }
+        }
+    };
+
+    // Basic information
+    updateElement('.modal-title', `Property Details - ${property.title}`);
+    updateElement('h4.text-primary', property.title);
+    updateElement('p.text-muted', property.address, true);
+
+    // Property specs
+    updateElement('[data-field="property_type"]', property.property_type?.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase() || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="bedrooms"]', property.bedrooms || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="bathrooms"]', property.bathrooms || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="square_feet"]', property.square_feet ? `${property.square_feet.toLocaleString()} sqft` : 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="parking_spaces"]', property.parking_spaces || 'N/A');
+
+    // Additional details
+    updateElement('[data-field="floors"]', property.floors || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="units"]', property.units || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="year_built"]', property.year_built || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="property_condition"]', property.property_condition?.replace('_', ' ').toUpperCase() || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="neighborhood"]', property.neighborhood || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="created_at"]', property.created_at || 'N/A');
+
+    // Pricing
+    const priceCard = modal.querySelector('.card.bg-success');
+    if (priceCard) {
+        let priceHtml = '';
+        if (property.listing_type === 'rental') {
+            priceHtml = `
+                <h6 class="card-title">Rental Pricing</h6>
+                ${property.rahn ? `<h4 class="mb-1">${property.rahn.toLocaleString()} تومان</h4><small>رهن (Rahn/Deposit)</small>` : ''}
+                ${property.ejare ? `<div class="mt-2"><h5 class="mb-1">${property.ejare.toLocaleString()} تومان</h5><small>اجاره (Ejare/Monthly)</small></div>` : ''}
+            `;
+        } else {
+            priceHtml = `
+                <h6 class="card-title">Sale Price</h6>
+                <h3 class="mb-1">$${property.price ? property.price.toLocaleString() : '0'}</h3>
+                <small>Sale Price</small>
+            `;
+        }
+        priceCard.querySelector('.card-body').innerHTML = priceHtml;
+    }
+
+    // Agent information
+    updateElement('[data-field="agent_name"]', property.agent_name || 'Unassigned');
+    updateElement('[data-field="agent_email"]', property.agent_email || 'N/A');
+    updateElement('[data-field="agent_phone"]', property.agent_phone || 'N/A');
+
+    // Deal statistics
+    updateElement('[data-field="total_deals"]', property.total_deals || '0');
+    updateElement('[data-field="active_deals"]', property.active_deals || '0');
+
+    // Features
+    const featuresContainer = modal.querySelector('.features-list');
+    if (featuresContainer && property.property_features) {
+        const features = property.property_features.split(',').map(f => f.trim()).filter(f => f);
+        featuresContainer.innerHTML = features.map(feature =>
+            `<span class="badge bg-secondary me-1 mb-1">${feature}</span>`
+        ).join('');
+    }
+
+    // Description
+    updateElement('[data-field="description"]', property.description || 'No description available');
+
+    // Update action buttons
+    const editBtn = modal.querySelector('button[onclick*="editProperty"]');
+    const shareBtn = modal.querySelector('button[onclick*="shareProperty"]');
+    const detailsBtn = modal.querySelector('a[data-action="details"]');
+
+    if (editBtn) editBtn.setAttribute('onclick', `editProperty(${property.id})`);
+    if (shareBtn) shareBtn.setAttribute('onclick', `shareProperty(${property.id})`);
+    if (detailsBtn) {
+        detailsBtn.setAttribute('href', property.detail_url || `/properties/${property.id}/detail`);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Populate property edit modal with data
+ */
+function populatePropertyEditModal(property) {
+    const modal = document.getElementById('propertyEditModal');
+    if (!modal) return;
+
+    const normalizeNumberInput = (rawValue) => {
+        if (rawValue === null || rawValue === undefined || rawValue === '') {
+            return '';
+        }
+        const normalized = String(rawValue)
+            .replace(/[,_\s]/g, '')
+            .replace(/[٬،]/g, '');
+        const parsed = Number.parseFloat(normalized);
+        if (!Number.isFinite(parsed)) {
+            return '';
+        }
+        return Number.isInteger(parsed) ? String(parsed) : String(parsed);
+    };
+
+    // Update form fields
+    const setFieldValue = (name, value) => {
+        const field = modal.querySelector(`[name="${name}"]`);
+        if (field) {
+            if (field.type === 'radio') {
+                const radioOption = modal.querySelector(`[name="${name}"][value="${value}"]`);
+                if (radioOption) radioOption.checked = true;
+            } else {
+                if (field.type === 'number') {
+                    field.value = normalizeNumberInput(value);
+                } else {
+                    field.value = value || '';
+                }
+            }
+        }
+    };
+
+    // Set all form fields
+    setFieldValue('title', property.title);
+    setFieldValue('address', property.address);
+    setFieldValue('property_type', property.property_type);
+    setFieldValue('bedrooms', property.bedrooms);
+    setFieldValue('bathrooms', property.bathrooms);
+    setFieldValue('square_feet', property.square_feet);
+    setFieldValue('description', property.description);
+    setFieldValue('year_built', property.year_built);
+    setFieldValue('parking_spaces', property.parking_spaces);
+    setFieldValue('floors', property.floors);
+    setFieldValue('units', property.units);
+    setFieldValue('property_condition', property.property_condition);
+    setFieldValue('neighborhood', property.neighborhood);
+    setFieldValue('property_category', property.property_category);
+    setFieldValue('listing_type', property.listing_type);
+    setFieldValue('property_features', property.property_features);
+    setFieldValue('agent_id', property.agent_id);
+
+    if (property.listing_type === 'sale') {
+        setFieldValue('sale_price', property.price);
+    } else {
+        setFieldValue('rahn', property.rahn);
+        setFieldValue('ejare', property.ejare);
+    }
+
+    // Trigger listing type change to show correct pricing section
+    const listingTypeRadio = modal.querySelector(`[name="listing_type"][value="${property.listing_type}"]`);
+    if (listingTypeRadio) {
+        listingTypeRadio.dispatchEvent(new Event('change'));
+    }
+
+    // Update property ID in hidden field
+    const propertyIdField = modal.querySelector('[name="property_id"]');
+    if (propertyIdField) {
+        propertyIdField.value = property.id;
+    }
+
+    // Trigger character counters and price calculations if enhanced modal is available
+    if (window.propertyEditModal && typeof window.propertyEditModal.calculatePricePerMeter === 'function') {
+        // Update character counters
+        ['edit_address', 'edit_property_features', 'edit_description'].forEach(id => {
+            const field = document.getElementById(id);
+            if (field) {
+                field.dispatchEvent(new Event('input'));
+            }
+        });
+
+        // Calculate prices
+        setTimeout(() => {
+            window.propertyEditModal.calculatePricePerMeter();
+        }, 100);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Populate property share modal with data
+ */
+function populatePropertyShareModal(sharing) {
+    const modal = document.getElementById('propertyShareModal');
+    if (!modal) return;
+
+    // Update sharing information
+    const updateElement = (selector, value) => {
+        const element = modal.querySelector(selector);
+        if (element) element.textContent = value;
+    };
+
+    updateElement('h6.text-primary', sharing.title);
+    updateElement('p.text-muted.small', sharing.address);
+    updateElement('.badge.bg-success', `$${sharing.price ? sharing.price.toLocaleString() : '0'}`);
+
+    // Update property link
+    const linkInput = modal.querySelector('#propertyLink');
+    if (linkInput) {
+        linkInput.value = sharing.url;
+    }
+
+    // Initialize sharing functionality
+    if (typeof initializePropertyShare === 'function') {
+        initializePropertyShare(sharing);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Bind property edit form submission
+ */
+function bindPropertyEditForm(propertyId) {
+    // Check if enhanced modal system is available
+    if (window.propertyEditModal) {
+        // Enhanced modal system handles form submission
+        console.log('Using enhanced property edit modal system');
+        return;
+    }
+
+    // Fallback to basic form handling
+    const form = document.getElementById('propertyEditForm');
+    if (!form) return;
+
+    // Remove existing event listeners
+    const newForm = form.cloneNode(true);
+    form.parentNode.replaceChild(newForm, form);
+
+    newForm.addEventListener('submit', async function (e) {
+        e.preventDefault();
+
+        try {
+            const formData = new FormData(newForm);
+            const submitBtn = newForm.querySelector('[type="submit"]');
+            const spinner = submitBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
+
+            // Show loading state
+            submitBtn.disabled = true;
+            spinner.classList.remove('d-none');
+
+            // Submit form
+            const response = await fetch(`/properties/${propertyId}`, {
+                method: 'POST',
+                body: formData,
+                headers: {
+                    'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest'
+                }
+            });
+
+            if (!response.ok) {
+                const errorData = await response.json();
+                throw new Error(errorData.message || 'Failed to update property');
+            }
+
+            const result = await response.json();
+
+            // Show success message
+            showNotification(result.message || 'Property updated successfully!', 'success');
+
+            // Close modal
+            const modal = bootstrap.Modal.getInstance(document.getElementById('propertyEditModal'));
+            if (modal) modal.hide();
+
+            // Reload page to show updated data
+            setTimeout(() => {
+                window.location.reload();
+            }, 1000);
+
+        } catch (error) {
+            console.error('Error updating property:', error);
+            showNotification(error.message || 'Failed to update property', 'error');
+        } finally {
+            // Reset loading state
+            const submitBtn = newForm.querySelector('[type="submit"]');
+            const spinner = submitBtn.querySelector('.spinner-border');
+            submitBtn.disabled = false;
+            spinner.classList.add('d-none');
+        }
+    });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Show loading indicator
+ */
+function showLoadingIndicator(message = 'Loading...') {
+    const loadingId = `loading_${Date.now()}`;
+    const loadingHtml = `
+        <div id="${loadingId}" class="loading-indicator position-fixed top-50 start-50 translate-middle" style="z-index: 2000;">
+            <div class="card shadow">
+                <div class="card-body text-center p-4">
+                    <div class="spinner-border text-primary mb-3" role="status">
+                        <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="fw-medium">${message}</div>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    `;
+
+    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', loadingHtml);
+    return document.getElementById(loadingId);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Hide loading indicator
+ */
+function hideLoadingIndicator(indicator) {
+    if (indicator && indicator.parentNode) {
+        indicator.remove();
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Hybrid Property View Functions
+ * Supports both modal and dedicated page viewing
+ */
+
+/**
+ * Smart property view - defaults to modal for quick view
+ * Users can still access full page via "Full Details" button
+ */
+function viewProperty(propertyId) {
+    // For backward compatibility, default to modal view
+    return viewPropertyModal(propertyId);
+}
+
+/**
+ * Copy property URL to clipboard
+ */
+function copyPropertyUrl(propertyId) {
+    const url = `${window.location.origin}/properties/${propertyId}/detail`;
+
+    if (navigator.clipboard) {
+        navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => {
+            showNotification('Property URL copied to clipboard!', 'success');
+        }).catch(err => {
+            console.error('Failed to copy URL:', err);
+            fallbackCopyText(url);
+        });
+    } else {
+        fallbackCopyText(url);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Fallback function for copying text (older browsers)
+ */
+function fallbackCopyText(text) {
+    const textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
+    textArea.value = text;
+    textArea.style.position = 'fixed';
+    textArea.style.opacity = '0';
+    document.body.appendChild(textArea);
+    textArea.focus();
+    textArea.select();
+
+    try {
+        document.execCommand('copy');
+        showNotification('Property URL copied to clipboard!', 'success');
+    } catch (err) {
+        console.error('Fallback copy failed:', err);
+        showNotification('Failed to copy URL. Please copy manually.', 'error');
+    } finally {
+        document.body.removeChild(textArea);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Enhanced share property with multiple options
+ */
+function sharePropertyAdvanced(propertyId, title, address, price) {
+    const propertyUrl = `${window.location.origin}/properties/${propertyId}/detail`;
+    const shareText = `Check out this property: ${title} at ${address}. Price: $${price ? price.toLocaleString() : 'Contact for price'}`;
+
+    // Check if Web Share API is supported
+    if (navigator.share) {
+        navigator.share({
+            title: `Property: ${title}`,
+            text: shareText,
+            url: propertyUrl
+        }).then(() => {
+            console.log('Property shared successfully');
+        }).catch(err => {
+            console.log('Error sharing property:', err);
+            showShareModal(propertyId, title, address, price, propertyUrl, shareText);
+        });
+    } else {
+        // Fallback to custom share modal
+        showShareModal(propertyId, title, address, price, propertyUrl, shareText);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Show custom share modal with multiple sharing options
+ */
+function showShareModal(propertyId, title, address, price, url, shareText) {
+    const shareModalHtml = `
+        <div class="modal fade" id="customShareModal" tabindex="-1">
+            <div class="modal-dialog">
+                <div class="modal-content">
+                    <div class="modal-header bg-primary text-white">
+                        <h5 class="modal-title">
+                            <i class="fas fa-share-alt me-2"></i>Share Property
+                        </h5>
+                        <button type="button" class="btn-close btn-close-white" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button>
+                    </div>
+                    <div class="modal-body">
+                        <div class="property-info mb-3">
+                            <h6 class="text-primary">${title}</h6>
+                            <p class="text-muted small mb-2">${address}</p>
+                            <span class="badge bg-success">$${price ? price.toLocaleString() : 'Contact for price'}</span>
+                        </div>
+                        
+                        <div class="share-options">
+                            <h6 class="mb-3">Share via:</h6>
+                            
+                            <div class="row g-2 mb-3">
+                                <div class="col-6">
+                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-primary w-100" onclick="shareOnFacebook('${url}', '${encodeURIComponent(shareText)}')">
+                                        <i class="fab fa-facebook-f me-2"></i>Facebook
+                                    </button>
+                                </div>
+                                <div class="col-6">
+                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-info w-100" onclick="shareOnTwitter('${url}', '${encodeURIComponent(shareText)}')">
+                                        <i class="fab fa-twitter me-2"></i>Twitter
+                                    </button>
+                                </div>
+                                <div class="col-6">
+                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-success w-100" onclick="shareOnWhatsApp('${encodeURIComponent(shareText + ' ' + url)}')">
+                                        <i class="fab fa-whatsapp me-2"></i>WhatsApp
+                                    </button>
+                                </div>
+                                <div class="col-6">
+                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary w-100" onclick="shareViaEmail('${encodeURIComponent(title)}', '${encodeURIComponent(shareText + '\\n\\n' + url)}')">
+                                        <i class="fas fa-envelope me-2"></i>Email
+                                    </button>
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                            
+                            <div class="mb-3">
+                                <label class="form-label">Property URL:</label>
+                                <div class="input-group">
+                                    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="sharePropertyUrl" value="${url}" readonly>
+                                    <button class="btn btn-outline-secondary" onclick="copyFromInput('#sharePropertyUrl')">
+                                        <i class="fas fa-copy"></i>
+                                    </button>
+                                </div>
+                            </div>
+                        </div>
+                    </div>
+                </div>
+            </div>
+        </div>
+    `;
+
+    // Remove existing modal if present
+    const existingModal = document.getElementById('customShareModal');
+    if (existingModal) existingModal.remove();
+
+    // Add new modal
+    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', shareModalHtml);
+
+    // Show modal
+    const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(document.getElementById('customShareModal'));
+    modal.show();
+
+    // Clean up when modal is hidden
+    document.getElementById('customShareModal').addEventListener('hidden.bs.modal', function () {
+        this.remove();
+    });
+}
+
+/**
+ * Social media sharing functions
+ */
+function shareOnFacebook(url, text) {
+    window.open(`https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=${encodeURIComponent(url)}&quote=${text}`, 'facebook-share', 'width=580,height=296');
+}
+
+function shareOnTwitter(url, text) {
+    window.open(`https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}&text=${text}`, 'twitter-share', 'width=550,height=420');
+}
+
+function shareOnWhatsApp(text) {
+    window.open(`https://wa.me/?text=${text}`, '_blank');
+}
+
+function shareViaEmail(subject, body) {
+    window.location.href = `mailto:?subject=${subject}&body=${body}`;
+}
+
+function copyFromInput(selector) {
+    const input = document.querySelector(selector);
+    if (input) {
+        input.select();
+        input.setSelectionRange(0, 99999); // For mobile devices
+
+        try {
+            document.execCommand('copy');
+            showNotification('URL copied to clipboard!', 'success');
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error('Failed to copy:', err);
+            showNotification('Failed to copy URL', 'error');
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Add to favorites functionality
+ */
+function addToFavorites(propertyId) {
+    // This would typically make an AJAX call to save the favorite
+    // For now, show a placeholder message
+    showNotification('Add to favorites functionality will be implemented here. This would save the property to user\'s favorites list.', 'info');
+
+    // Placeholder implementation:
+    const favoriteProperties = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('favoriteProperties') || '[]');
+
+    if (!favoriteProperties.includes(propertyId)) {
+        favoriteProperties.push(propertyId);
+        localStorage.setItem('favoriteProperties', JSON.stringify(favoriteProperties));
+        showNotification('Property added to favorites!', 'success');
+
+        // Update the heart icon if it exists
+        const heartBtn = event.target.closest('.btn');
+        if (heartBtn) {
+            const icon = heartBtn.querySelector('i');
+            if (icon) {
+                icon.classList.remove('far');
+                icon.classList.add('fas');
+                icon.style.color = '#dc3545';
+            }
+        }
+    } else {
+        showNotification('Property is already in favorites!', 'warning');
+    }
+}

+/**
+ * Schedule viewing functionality
+ */
+function scheduleViewing(propertyId) {
+    // Placeholder for scheduling functionality
+    showNotification('Schedule viewing functionality will be implemented here. This could open a calendar modal or redirect to a scheduling system.', 'info');
+
+    // Example implementation would be:
+    // window.open(`/properties/${propertyId}/schedule-viewing`, '_blank');
+}
+
+/**
+ * Smart device detection for optimal viewing experience
+ */
+function getOptimalViewMode() {
+    const isMobile = window.innerWidth <= 768;
+    const isTablet = window.innerWidth > 768 && window.innerWidth <= 1024;
+
+    // On mobile, prefer full page for better UX
+    if (isMobile) {
+        return 'page';
+    }
+
+    // On desktop/tablet, prefer modal for quick browsing
+    return 'modal';
+}
+
+/**
+ * Adaptive property viewing based on device and user preference
+ */
+function viewPropertyAdaptive(propertyId) {
+    const userPreference = localStorage.getItem('propertyViewPreference');
+    const optimalMode = getOptimalViewMode();
+
+    const viewMode = userPreference || optimalMode;
+
+    if (viewMode === 'page') {
+        // Open in new tab/window
+        window.open(`/properties/${propertyId}/detail`, '_blank');
+    } else {
+        // Show modal
+        viewPropertyModal(propertyId);
+    }
+}
+
+/**
+ * Set user preference for property viewing
+ */
+function setPropertyViewPreference(preference) {
+    localStorage.setItem('propertyViewPreference', preference);
+    showNotification(`Property view preference set to ${preference}`, 'success');
+}
+
+// Make functions globally available
+window.viewProperty = viewProperty;
+window.viewPropertyModal = viewPropertyModal;
+window.editProperty = editProperty;
+window.shareProperty = shareProperty;
+window.sharePropertyAdvanced = sharePropertyAdvanced;
+window.copyPropertyUrl = copyPropertyUrl;
+window.addToFavorites = addToFavorites;
+window.scheduleViewing = scheduleViewing;
+window.viewPropertyAdaptive = viewPropertyAdaptive;
+window.setPropertyViewPreference = setPropertyViewPreference;

+console.log('Real Estate CRM JavaScript with hybrid property view loaded successfully');

+// --- AI Copilot Integration ---
+window.chatHistoryState = [];
+
+document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
+    const copilotForm = document.getElementById('copilotForm');
+
+    if (copilotForm) {
+        copilotForm.addEventListener('submit', function (e) {
+            e.preventDefault();
+            sendCopilotMessage();
+        });
+    }
+});
+
+async function sendCopilotMessage() {
+    const inputEl = document.getElementById('copilotInput');
+    const message = inputEl.value.trim();
+
+    if (!message) return;
+
+    appendChatMessage(message, 'user');
+    inputEl.value = '';
+
+    const thinkingId = 'thinking-' + Date.now();
+    appendChatMessage('<i class="fas fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Copilot is thinking...', 'ai', thinkingId);
+
+    const csrfToken = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') ||
+        document.querySelector('input[name="csrf_token"]')?.value || '';
+
+    try {
+        const response = await fetch('/api/v1/chat/copilot', {
+            method: 'POST',
+            headers: {
+                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+                'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+                'X-CSRFToken': csrfToken
+            },
+            body: JSON.stringify({
+                message: message,
+                history: window.chatHistoryState
+            })
+        });
+
+        let data = { reply: "Error parsing response." };
+        try {
+            data = await response.json();
+        } catch (e) {
+            console.error(e);
+        }
+
+        const thinkingEl = document.getElementById(thinkingId);
+        if (thinkingEl) thinkingEl.remove();
+
+        if (!response.ok) {
+            if (response.status === 401) {
+                appendChatMessage("Session expired. Please log in again.", 'ai', null, 'text-danger');
+            } else {
+                appendChatMessage(data.message || data.error || data.reply || "An error occurred.", 'ai', null, 'text-danger');
+            }
+            return;
+        }
+
+        window.chatHistoryState.push({ "role": "user", "parts": [message] });
+        window.chatHistoryState.push({ "role": "model", "parts": [data.reply] });
+
+        appendChatMessage(data.reply, 'ai');
+
+    } catch (error) {
+        const thinkingEl = document.getElementById(thinkingId);
+        if (thinkingEl) thinkingEl.remove();
+        console.error("Copilot Error:", error);
+        appendChatMessage("Failed to connect to the Copilot service.", 'ai', null, 'text-danger');
+    }
+}
+
+function appendChatMessage(text, sender, id = null, extraClass = '') {
+    const chatBox = document.getElementById('copilotChatBox');
+    if (!chatBox) return;
+
+    const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
+    wrapper.className = `mb-3 ${sender === 'user' ? 'text-end' : 'text-start'} chat-message`;
+    if (id) wrapper.id = id;
+
+    const bubble = document.createElement('span');
+    bubble.className = `d-inline-block p-2 rounded shadow-sm ${sender === 'user' ? 'bg-primary text-white' : 'bg-white border text-dark'} ${extraClass}`;
+
+    let formattedText = text.replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>');
+    formattedText = formattedText.replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
+    bubble.innerHTML = formattedText;
+
+    wrapper.appendChild(bubble);
+    chatBox.appendChild(wrapper);
+    chatBox.scrollTop = chatBox.scrollHeight;
+}
+
+function resolveCopilotCsrfToken() {
+    return document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.getAttribute('content') ||
+        document.querySelector('input[name="csrf_token"]')?.value || '';
+}
+
+async function generateCopilotPitch(customerId, options = {}) {
+    const numericCustomerId = Number(customerId);
+    if (!Number.isFinite(numericCustomerId) || numericCustomerId <= 0) {
+        return null;
+    }
+
+    const payload = {
+        max_results: Number(options.maxResults) > 0 ? Number(options.maxResults) : 3,
+        min_property_score: Number(options.minPropertyScore) >= 0 ? Number(options.minPropertyScore) : 50
+    };
+
+    const response = await fetch(`/api/v1/copilot/matchmaker/${numericCustomerId}`, {
+        method: 'POST',
+        headers: {
+            'Content-Type': 'application/json',
+            'X-Requested-With': 'XMLHttpRequest',
+            'X-CSRFToken': resolveCopilotCsrfToken()
+        },
+        credentials: 'same-origin',
+        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
+    });
+
+    let data = {};
+    try {
+        data = await response.json();
+    } catch (err) {
+        data = {};
+    }
+
+    if (!response.ok) {
+        const error = new Error(data.message || data.error || 'Failed to generate Copilot pitch.');
+        error.status = response.status;
+        throw error;
+    }
+
+    if (data.sms_draft) {
+        appendChatMessage(data.sms_draft, 'ai');
+    }
+    return data;
+}
+
+let copilotPitchBindings = [];
+
+function teardownCopilotPitchBindings() {
+    copilotPitchBindings.forEach((unbind) => {
+        try {
+            unbind();
+        } catch (err) {
+            console.error('Failed to unbind Copilot pitch listener:', err);
+        }
+    });
+    copilotPitchBindings = [];
+}
+
+function bindCopilotPitchButtons(root = document) {
+    teardownCopilotPitchBindings();
+    root.querySelectorAll('[data-generate-copilot-pitch]').forEach((button) => {
+        const handler = async (event) => {
+            event.preventDefault();
+            const customerId = button.getAttribute('data-customer-id') || button.dataset.customerId;
+            if (!customerId) return;
+
+            const originalText = button.textContent;
+            button.disabled = true;
+            button.textContent = 'Generating...';
+            try {
+                await generateCopilotPitch(customerId, {
+                    maxResults: button.dataset.maxResults,
+                    minPropertyScore: button.dataset.minPropertyScore
+                });
+            } catch (error) {
+                appendChatMessage(error.message || 'Unable to generate pitch.', 'ai', null, 'text-danger');
+            } finally {
+                button.disabled = false;
+                button.textContent = originalText;
+            }
+        };
+
+        button.addEventListener('click', handler);
+        copilotPitchBindings.push(() => button.removeEventListener('click', handler));
+    });
+}
+
+window.generateCopilotPitch = generateCopilotPitch;
+window.bindCopilotPitchButtons = bindCopilotPitchButtons;
+window.teardownCopilotPitchBindings = teardownCopilotPitchBindings;
+
+document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
+    bindCopilotPitchButtons(document);
+});

-    function renderAnalysis(data) {
-        const analysisDiv = document.getElementById('marketAnalysis');
-        if (!data) return;
-        const updated = data.updated_at ? `<small class="text-muted">Updated: ${new Date(data.updated_at).toLocaleString()}</small>` : '';
-
-        if (Array.isArray(data.bullets) && data.bullets.length > 0) {
-            const bullets = data.bullets.map(b => `<li>${b}</li>`).join('');
-            const overview = data.analysis ? `<p class="mb-2">${data.analysis}</p>` : '';
-            analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-                <div class="small" style="max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto;">
-                    ${overview}
-                    <ul class="mb-2">${bullets}</ul>
-                    ${updated}
-                </div>
-            `;
-            return;
-        }
-
-        if (data.analysis) {
-            let analysisText = data.analysis;
-            analysisText = analysisText
-                .replace(/\*\*(.*?)\*\*/g, '<strong>$1</strong>')
-                .replace(/\*(.*?)\*/g, '<em>$1</em>')
-                .replace(/\n/g, '<br>');
-            analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-                <div class="small" style="max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto;">
-                    ${analysisText}
-                    ${updated}
-                </div>
-            `;
-            return;
-        }
-
-        analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-            <div class="text-muted">
-                <i class="fas fa-info-circle me-2"></i>
-                Market analysis unavailable. Check your API configuration.
-            </div>
-        `;
-    }
-
-    function saveAnalysis(data) {
-        try {
-            localStorage.setItem('marketAnalysis', JSON.stringify(data));
-        } catch {}
-    }
-
-    function loadSavedAnalysis() {
-        try {
-            const raw = localStorage.getItem('marketAnalysis');
-            if (!raw) return null;
-            return JSON.parse(raw);
-        } catch { return null; }
-    }
-
-    function setLoading() {
-        const analysisDiv = document.getElementById('marketAnalysis');
-        analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-            <div class="text-center">
-                <div class="spinner-border text-primary" role="status">
-                    <span class="visually-hidden">Loading...</span>
-                </div>
-                <p class="mt-2">Generating market analysis...</p>
-                <small class="text-muted">This may take a few seconds</small>
-            </div>
-        `;
-    }
-
-    async function fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries=2, backoff=800) {
-        try {
-            const controller = new AbortController();
-            const to = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 25000);
-            const resp = await fetch(url, { ...(options||{}), signal: controller.signal });
-            clearTimeout(to);
-            if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}`);
-            return await resp.json();
-        } catch (e) {
-            if (retries > 0) {
-                await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, backoff));
-                return fetchWithRetry(url, options, retries-1, backoff*2);
-            }
-            throw e;
-        }
-    }
-
-    function refreshMarketAnalysis() {
-        setLoading();
-        fetchWithRetry('/api/market-analysis', null, 2, 800)
-            .then(data => {
-                if (data) {
-                    renderAnalysis(data);
-                    saveAnalysis(data);
-                }
-            })
-            .catch(error => {

-                const saved = loadSavedAnalysis();

-                    analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-                        <div class="text-warning">
-                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-circle me-2"></i>
-                            Live analysis unavailable ( ${error.message} ). Showing last saved.
-                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-warning ms-2" onclick="refreshMarketAnalysis()">Retry</button>
-                        </div>
-                    `;
-                    renderAnalysis(saved);
-                } else {
-                    analysisDiv.innerHTML = `
-                        <div class="text-danger">
-                            <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle me-2"></i>
-                            Error loading analysis: ${error.message}
-                            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger ms-2" onclick="refreshMarketAnalysis()">Retry</button>
-                        </div>
-                    `;
-                }
-            });
-    }

-<script>
-// Iranian Real Estate Pricing System with Dynamic Forms
-document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
-    const listingTypeRadios = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="listing_type"]');
-    const salePricing = document.getElementById('sale-pricing');
-    const rentalPricing = document.getElementById('rental-pricing');
-    
-    // Form inputs
-    const squareFeetInput = document.getElementById('square_feet');
-    const salePriceInput = document.getElementById('sale_price');
-    const salePricePerMeterInput = document.getElementById('sale_price_per_meter');
-    const rahnInput = document.getElementById('rahn');
-    const ejareInput = document.getElementById('ejare');
-    const rahnPerMeterInput = document.getElementById('rahn_per_meter');
-    const ejarePerMeterInput = document.getElementById('ejare_per_meter');
-    
-    // Switch between Sale and Rental pricing
-    listingTypeRadios.forEach(radio => {
-        radio.addEventListener('change', function() {
-            if (this.value === 'sale') {
-                salePricing.style.display = 'block';
-                rentalPricing.style.display = 'none';
-                salePriceInput.required = true;
-                rahnInput.required = false;
-                ejareInput.required = false;
-            } else {
-                salePricing.style.display = 'none';
-                rentalPricing.style.display = 'block';
-                salePriceInput.required = false;
-                rahnInput.required = true;
-                ejareInput.required = true;
-            }
-            // Recalculate when switching
-            calculatePrices();
-        });
-    });
-    
-    // Real-time price per meter calculations
-    function calculatePrices() {
-        const squareMeters = parseFloat(squareFeetInput.value) || 0;
-        
-        if (squareMeters > 0) {
-            // Calculate sale price per meter
-            const salePrice = parseFloat(salePriceInput.value) || 0;
-            if (salePrice > 0) {
-                const salePricePerMeter = (salePrice / squareMeters).toFixed(0);
-                salePricePerMeterInput.value = `$${parseInt(salePricePerMeter).toLocaleString()}/m²`;
-            } else {
-                salePricePerMeterInput.value = '';
-            }
-            
-            // Calculate rahn per meter
-            const rahn = parseFloat(rahnInput.value) || 0;
-            if (rahn > 0) {
-                const rahnPerMeter = (rahn / squareMeters).toFixed(0);
-                rahnPerMeterInput.value = `${parseInt(rahnPerMeter).toLocaleString()} تومان/متر`;
-            } else {
-                rahnPerMeterInput.value = '';
-            }
-            
-            // Calculate ejare per meter
-            const ejare = parseFloat(ejareInput.value) || 0;
-            if (ejare > 0) {
-                const ejarePerMeter = (ejare / squareMeters).toFixed(0);
-                ejarePerMeterInput.value = `${parseInt(ejarePerMeter).toLocaleString()} تومان/متر`;
-            } else {
-                ejarePerMeterInput.value = '';
-            }
-        } else {
-            // Clear all per-meter calculations
-            salePricePerMeterInput.value = '';
-            rahnPerMeterInput.value = '';
-            ejarePerMeterInput.value = '';
-        }
-    }
-    
-    // Add event listeners for real-time calculations
-    if (squareFeetInput) squareFeetInput.addEventListener('input', calculatePrices);
-    if (salePriceInput) salePriceInput.addEventListener('input', calculatePrices);
-    if (rahnInput) rahnInput.addEventListener('input', calculatePrices);
-    if (ejareInput) ejareInput.addEventListener('input', calculatePrices);
-    
-    // Auto-format large numbers with commas for Iranian currency
-    function formatIranianNumber(input) {
-        input.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
-            let value = e.target.value.replace(/,/g, '');
-            if (!isNaN(value) && value !== '') {
-                e.target.value = parseInt(value).toLocaleString();
-            }
-        });
-    }
-    
-    // Apply formatting to relevant inputs
-    if (salePriceInput) formatIranianNumber(salePriceInput);
-    if (rahnInput) formatIranianNumber(rahnInput);
-    if (ejareInput) formatIranianNumber(ejareInput);
-    
-    // Initialize calculations
-    calculatePrices();
-});
-</script>
-{% endblock %}

-    def _calculate_hybrid_score(
-        self, customer: Customer, property: Property, similarity_score: float
-    ) -> float:
-        """
-        Calculate hybrid score combining semantic similarity with rule-based factors
-        Weights: Semantic similarity (60%), Budget match (25%), Hard requirements (15%)
-        """
-        # Semantic similarity (60% weight)
-        semantic_component = similarity_score * 0.6
-
-        # Budget compatibility (25% weight)
-        budget_score = 0
-        if customer.budget_min <= property.price <= customer.budget_max:
-            budget_score = 100
-        elif property.price <= customer.budget_max * 1.1:  # 10% tolerance
-            budget_score = 80
-        elif property.price <= customer.budget_max * 1.2:  # 20% tolerance
-            budget_score = 60
-        else:
-            budget_score = 20
-
-        budget_component = budget_score * 0.25
-
-        # Hard requirements (15% weight)
-        requirements_score = 0
-
-        # Bedroom match
-        if property.bedrooms == customer.preferred_bedrooms:
-            requirements_score += 40
-        elif abs(property.bedrooms - customer.preferred_bedrooms) <= 1:
-            requirements_score += 20
-
-        # Bathroom match
-        if property.bathrooms >= customer.preferred_bathrooms:
-            requirements_score += 30
-        elif property.bathrooms >= customer.preferred_bathrooms - 0.5:
-            requirements_score += 15
-
-        # Property type match
-        if property.property_type.lower() == customer.preferred_type.lower():
-            requirements_score += 30
-
-        requirements_component = requirements_score * 0.15
-
-        # Final hybrid score
-        hybrid_score = semantic_component + budget_component + requirements_component
-        return min(100, max(0, hybrid_score))

-            reasons.append("Matches property type preference")

+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _wants_json() -> bool:
+    """Return True when the request explicitly expects JSON."""
+    if request.is_json:
+        return True
+    if request.headers.get("X-Requested-With") == "XMLHttpRequest":
+        return True
+    accept = request.headers.get("Accept", "").lower()
+    if "application/json" in accept:
+        return True
+    return request.args.get("format", "").lower() == "json"
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _is_mobile_view() -> bool:
+    return request.args.get("mobile", "").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
+

+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>/dashboard")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def agent_dashboard(agent_id):
+    """Agent dashboard with notifications and property matches."""
+    try:
+        agent = database_service.get_agent(agent_id)
+        if not agent:
+            flash("Agent not found", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+        
+        # Get notifications for the agent
+        notifications = notification_service.get_agent_notifications(agent_id, limit=20)
+        
+        # Get notification summary
+        notification_summary = notification_service.get_notification_summary(agent_id)
+        
+        # Get agent's recent activity
+        recent_properties = [p for p in agent.properties if p.status == "active"][:5]
+        recent_deals = agent.deals[-5:] if agent.deals else []
+        pending_tasks = [t for t in agent.tasks if t.status == "pending"][:5]
+        
+        template_name = "agent_dashboard_alexander_sterling_mobile.html" if _is_mobile_view() else "agent_dashboard_alexander_sterling.html"
+        return render_template(template_name, 
+                             agent=agent,
+                             notifications=notifications,
+                             notification_summary=notification_summary,
+                             recent_properties=recent_properties,
+                             recent_deals=recent_deals,
+                             pending_tasks=pending_tasks)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error loading agent dashboard")
+        flash(f"Error loading dashboard: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>/notifications")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def agent_notifications(agent_id):
+    """Get agent notifications (AJAX endpoint)."""
+    try:
+        status = request.args.get('status')  # unread, read, dismissed
+        limit = int(request.args.get('limit', 20))
+        
+        notifications = notification_service.get_agent_notifications(agent_id, status, limit)
+        
+        return jsonify({
+            'notifications': [n.to_dict() for n in notifications],
+            'count': len(notifications)
+        })
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error getting agent notifications")
+        return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
+
+
+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>/notifications/<int:notification_id>/read", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def mark_notification_read(agent_id, notification_id):
+    """Mark a notification as read."""
+    try:
+        success = notification_service.mark_notification_as_read(notification_id, agent_id)
+        if success:
+            return jsonify({'success': True, 'message': 'Notification marked as read'})
+        else:
+            return jsonify({'success': False, 'message': 'Notification not found'}), 404
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error marking notification as read")
+        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}), 500
+
+
+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>/notifications/<int:notification_id>/dismiss", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def dismiss_notification(agent_id, notification_id):
+    """Dismiss a notification."""
+    try:
+        success = notification_service.dismiss_notification(notification_id, agent_id)
+        if success:
+            return jsonify({'success': True, 'message': 'Notification dismissed'})
+        else:
+            return jsonify({'success': False, 'message': 'Notification not found'}), 404
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error dismissing notification")
+        return jsonify({'success': False, 'error': str(e)}), 500

+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>/edit", methods=["GET"])
+@handle_database_error
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def edit_agent(agent_id):
+    """Get agent edit form for modal"""
+    try:
+        agent = database_service.get_agent(agent_id)
+        if not agent:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({'error': 'Agent not found'}), 404
+            flash("Agent not found", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+        
+        # Create form with current agent data
+        form = AgentEditForm(agent_id=agent_id)
+        form.name.data = agent.name
+        form.email.data = agent.email
+        form.phone.data = agent.phone
+        form.specialization.data = agent.specialization
+        form.bio.data = agent.bio
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({
+                'agent': {
+                    'id': agent.id,
+                    'name': agent.name,
+                    'email': agent.email,
+                    'phone': agent.phone,
+                    'specialization': agent.specialization,
+                    'bio': agent.bio
+                }
+            })
+        
+        return render_template("modals/agent_edit_modal.html", agent=agent, form=form)
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error loading agent edit form")
+        error_msg = f"Error loading agent: {str(e)}"
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({'error': error_msg}), 500
+        
+        flash(error_msg, "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+

+@bp.route("/agents/<int:agent_id>", methods=["PUT", "POST"])
+@handle_database_error
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_agent(agent_id):
+    """Update agent data"""
+    try:
+        agent = database_service.get_agent(agent_id)
+        if not agent:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({'error': 'Agent not found'}), 404
+            flash("Agent not found", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+        
+        form = AgentEditForm(agent_id=agent_id)
+        
+        # Handle form validation errors
+        error_response = handle_form_errors(form)
+        if error_response:
+            return error_response
+        
+        # Update agent
+        updated_agent = database_service.update_agent(
+            agent_id,
+            name=form.name.data,
+            email=form.email.data,
+            phone=form.phone.data,
+            specialization=form.specialization.data or "",
+            bio=form.bio.data or ""
+        )
+        
+        success_msg = f'Agent "{updated_agent.name}" updated successfully!'
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return safe_json_response(
+                data={
+                    'agent': {
+                        'id': updated_agent.id,
+                        'name': updated_agent.name,
+                        'email': updated_agent.email,
+                        'phone': updated_agent.phone,
+                        'specialization': updated_agent.specialization,
+                        'bio': updated_agent.bio
+                    }
+                },
+                message=success_msg
+            )
+        
+        flash(success_msg, "success")
+        return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error updating agent")
+        if isinstance(e, BadRequest):
+            return jsonify({
+                'error': 'Validation failed',
+                'errors': {'json': ['Invalid JSON payload']}
+            }), 400
+        error_msg = f"Error updating agent: {str(e)}"
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({'error': error_msg}), 500
+        
+        flash(error_msg, "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("agents.agents"))
+
+

+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _wants_json() -> bool:
+    """Return True when the request explicitly expects JSON."""
+    if request.is_json:
+        return True
+    if request.headers.get("X-Requested-With") == "XMLHttpRequest":
+        return True
+    accept = request.headers.get("Accept", "").lower()
+    if "application/json" in accept:
+        return True
+    return request.args.get("format", "").lower() == "json"
+

+@bp.route("/customers/<int:customer_id>", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def view_customer(customer_id):
+    """Get customer details for viewing modal"""
+    try:
+        customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+        if not customer:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({'error': 'Customer not found'}), 404
+            flash('Customer not found', 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+        
+        # Calculate additional customer statistics
+        active_customer_deals = [d for d in customer.deals if not d.is_deleted]
+        total_deals = len(active_customer_deals)
+        active_deals = len([d for d in active_customer_deals if d.status not in ["closed_won", "closed_lost"]])
+        total_deal_value = sum(deal.offer_amount for deal in active_customer_deals)
+        
+        customer_data = {
+            'id': customer.id,
+            'name': customer.name,
+            'email': customer.email,
+            'phone': customer.phone,
+            'budget_min': customer.budget_min,
+            'budget_max': customer.budget_max,
+            'preferred_bedrooms': customer.preferred_bedrooms,
+            'preferred_bathrooms': customer.preferred_bathrooms,
+            'preferred_type': customer.preferred_type,
+            'location_preference': customer.location_preference,
+            'status': customer.status,
+            'created_at': customer.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') if customer.created_at else '',
+            'total_deals': total_deals,
+            'active_deals': active_deals,
+            'total_deal_value': total_deal_value,
+            'deals': [
+                {
+                    'id': d.id,
+                    'status': d.status,
+                    'offer_amount': d.offer_amount,
+                    'property_title': d.property.title if d.property else 'N/A'
+                }
+                for d in active_customer_deals
+            ]
+        }
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({'customer': customer_data})
+
+        return render_template("modals/customer_view_modal.html", customer=customer_data)
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving customer")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f'Error retrieving customer: {str(e)}', 'error')
+        return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+

+@bp.route("/customers/<int:customer_id>", methods=["PUT", "POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_customer(customer_id):
+    """Update customer data"""
+    try:
+        customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+        if not customer:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({'error': 'Customer not found'}), 404
+            flash('Customer not found', 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+        
+        form = CustomerEditForm(customer_id=customer_id)
+        if not form.validate_on_submit():
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({'error': 'Validation failed', 'errors': form.errors}), 400
+            for field, errors in form.errors.items():
+                for error in errors:
+                    flash(f'{field}: {error}', 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+        
+        # Update customer with form data
+        updated_customer = database_service.update_customer(
+            customer_id,
+            name=form.name.data,
+            email=form.email.data,
+            phone=form.phone.data,
+            budget_min=int(form.budget_min.data or 0),
+            budget_max=int(form.budget_max.data or 0),
+            preferred_bedrooms=int(form.preferred_bedrooms.data or 0),
+            preferred_bathrooms=int(form.preferred_bathrooms.data or 0),
+            preferred_type=form.preferred_type.data or "",
+            location_preference=form.location_preference.data or "",
+        )
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({
+                'success': True,
+                'message': f'Customer "{updated_customer.name}" updated successfully!',
+                'customer': {
+                    'id': updated_customer.id,
+                    'name': updated_customer.name,
+                    'email': updated_customer.email,
+                    'phone': updated_customer.phone
+                }
+            })
+        
+        flash(f'Customer "{updated_customer.name}" updated successfully!', 'success')
+        return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error updating customer")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({'error': str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f'Error updating customer: {str(e)}', 'error')
+        return redirect(url_for('customers.customers'))
+
+

+@log_execution

+def _wants_json() -> bool:
+    """True when caller expects a JSON payload (AJAX/API style)."""
+    accept = request.headers.get("Accept", "").lower()

+        or "application/json" in accept
+        or request.args.get("format") == "json"

+def _is_mobile_view() -> bool:

+@bp.route("/deals/<int:deal_id>", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def view_deal(deal_id):
+    """Get deal details with property and customer info"""
+    try:
+        deal = database_service.get_deal_with_relations(deal_id)
+        if not deal:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Deal not found"}), 404
+            flash("Deal not found", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            deal_payload = {
+                "id": deal.id,
+                "status": deal.status,
+                "offer_amount": deal.offer_amount,
+                "created_at": deal.created_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
+                "updated_at": deal.updated_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") if deal.updated_at else None,
+            }
+            property_payload = {
+                "id": deal.property.id,
+                "title": deal.property.title,
+                "address": deal.property.address,
+                "price": deal.property.price,
+                "property_type": deal.property.property_type,
+                "bedrooms": deal.property.bedrooms,
+                "bathrooms": deal.property.bathrooms,
+                "square_feet": deal.property.square_feet,
+                "description": deal.property.description,
+            } if deal.property else None
+            customer_payload = {
+                "id": deal.customer.id,
+                "name": deal.customer.name,
+                "email": deal.customer.email,
+                "phone": deal.customer.phone,
+                "budget_min": deal.customer.budget_min,
+                "budget_max": deal.customer.budget_max,
+            } if deal.customer else None
+            agent_payload = {
+                "id": deal.agent.id,
+                "name": deal.agent.name,
+                "email": deal.agent.email,
+                "phone": deal.agent.phone,
+                "specialization": deal.agent.specialization,
+            } if deal.agent else None
+
+            # Keep both legacy and new response contracts for compatibility.
+            return jsonify({
+                **deal_payload,
+                "deal": deal_payload,
+                "property": property_payload,
+                "customer": customer_payload,
+                "agent": agent_payload,
+            })
+        else:
+            # Return HTML template for direct access
+            return render_template("modals/deal_view_modal.html", deal=deal)
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving deal")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error retrieving deal: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/deals/<int:deal_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_deal(deal_id):
+    """Delete a deal"""
+    try:
+        success = database_service.delete_deal(deal_id)
+        if success:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"message": "Deal deleted successfully"})
+            flash("Deal deleted successfully!", "success")
+        else:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Deal not found"}), 404
+            flash("Deal not found", "error")
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error deleting deal")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error deleting deal: {str(e)}", "error")
+    
+    if not _wants_json():
+        return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+
