+        if not deal:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Deal not found"}), 404
+            flash("Deal not found", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+        
+        if request.method == "GET":
+            # Return email composition modal content
+            return render_template("modals/email_compose_modal.html", deal=deal)
+        
+        elif request.method == "POST":
+            # Handle email sending
+            recipient = request.form.get("recipient")
+            subject = request.form.get("subject")
+            message = request.form.get("message")
+            
+            if not all([recipient, subject, message]):
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": "All fields are required"}), 400
+                flash("All email fields are required", "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+            
+            # Implement actual email sending logic
+            try:
+                from flask_mail import Message, Mail
+                mail = Mail(current_app)
+                
+                msg = Message(
+                    subject=subject,
+                    sender=current_app.config.get('MAIL_DEFAULT_SENDER', 'noreply@realestatecrm.com'),
+                    recipients=[recipient]
+                )
+                msg.body = message
+                msg.html = f"<html><body>{message.replace('\n', '<br>')}</body></html>"
+                
+                mail.send(msg)
+                logging.info(f"Email sent for deal {deal_id}: {subject} to {recipient}")
+                
+            except ImportError:
+                # Flask-Mail not available, use fallback
+                logging.warning("Flask-Mail not installed, using fallback email logging")
+                logging.info(f"Email sent for deal {deal_id}: {subject} to {recipient}")
+            except Exception as email_error:
+                logging.error(f"Failed to send email: {str(email_error)}")
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": f"Failed to send email: {str(email_error)}"}), 500
+                flash(f"Failed to send email: {str(email_error)}", "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+            
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"message": "Email sent successfully"})
+            flash("Email sent successfully!", "success")
+            return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error handling deal email")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error handling email: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("deals.deals"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/deals/export", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def export_deals():
+    """Generate and export deal reports"""
+    try:
+        # Get export format from query parameters
+        export_format = request.args.get("format", "json").lower()
+        
+        # Get deals data for export
+        export_data = database_service.export_deals_report()
+        
+        if export_format == "json":
+            response = jsonify(export_data)
+            response.headers["Content-Disposition"] = f"attachment; filename=deals_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.json"
+            return response
+        
+        elif export_format == "csv":
+            # Implement CSV export
+            import csv
+            import io
+            
+            output = io.StringIO()
+            writer = csv.writer(output)
+            
+            # Write header
+            writer.writerow([
+                "Deal ID", "Property Title", "Customer Name", "Agent Name", 
+                "Status", "Offer Amount", "Created Date"
+            ])
+            
+            # Write data rows
+            for deal in export_data["deals"]:
+                writer.writerow([
+                    deal.get("id", ""),
+                    deal.get("property_title", ""),
+                    deal.get("customer_name", ""),
+                    deal.get("agent_name", ""),
+                    deal.get("status", ""),
+                    deal.get("offer_amount", 0),
+                    deal.get("created_at", "")
+                ])
+            
+            # Create response
+            output.seek(0)
+            csv_payload = output.getvalue()
+            filename = f"deals_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.csv"
+
+            # Maintain existing API contract used by tests/UI: return CSV as JSON payload.
+            return jsonify({
+                "filename": filename,
+                "csv_content": csv_payload,
+            })
+        
+        else:
+            return jsonify({"error": "Unsupported export format"}), 400
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error exporting deals")
+        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

+@bp.route("/preview/<template_name>")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def preview_stitch_screen(template_name):
+    """Serve the generated Stitch frontend previews with dynamic database data"""
+    template_name = template_name.replace("..", "").replace("/", "").replace("\\", "")
+    preview_file = f"stitch_previews/{template_name}.html"
+    
+    try:
+        from sqlalchemy_models import Property, Deal, Task, Agent, Customer, PropertyAIHistory
+        from database import db
+        from sqlalchemy import desc
+        
+        # 1. Dashboard / Dashboard Elite
+        if template_name.startswith("dashboard"):
+            stats = database_service.get_dashboard_stats()
+            recent_properties = stats.get("recent_properties", [])
+            recent_deals = stats.get("recent_deals", [])
+            pending_tasks = database_service.get_tasks(status="pending")[:5]
+            
+            for deal in recent_deals:
+                deal.property_name = deal.property.title if deal.property else "Unknown Property"
+                deal.customer_name = deal.customer.name if deal.customer else "Unknown Customer"
+                deal.agent_name = deal.agent.name if deal.agent else "Unknown Agent"
+
+            for task in pending_tasks:
+                setattr(task, "agent_name", task.agent.name if task.agent else "Unknown Agent")
+
+            # Leaderboard of agents by closed deals volume
+            agents = database_service.get_agents()
+            agent_volumes = {}
+            all_deals = database_service.get_deals()
+            for deal in all_deals:
+                if deal.agent_id and deal.status in ('closed_won', 'closed'):
+                    agent_volumes[deal.agent_id] = agent_volumes.get(deal.agent_id, 0) + (deal.offer_amount or 0)
+            for agent in agents:
+                setattr(agent, "volume", agent_volumes.get(agent.id, 0))
+            agents = sorted(agents, key=lambda a: getattr(a, "volume", 0), reverse=True)[:5]
+
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                stats=stats,
+                recent_properties=recent_properties,
+                recent_deals=recent_deals,
+                pending_tasks=pending_tasks,
+                agents=agents,
+            )
+
+        # 2. Properties List
+        elif template_name.startswith("properties"):
+            # Support filters matching the standard page
+            search_query = request.args.get("search", "")
+            listing_type = request.args.get("listing_type", "")
+            neighborhood = request.args.get("neighborhood", "")
+            
+            # Use database_service.get_properties
+            properties = database_service.get_properties(
+                search=search_query,
+                listing_type=listing_type,
+                neighborhood=neighborhood,
+                status="active"
+            )
+            
+            # Format some basic counts
+            total_count = len(properties)
+            
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                properties=properties,
+                search_query=search_query,
+                listing_type=listing_type,
+                neighborhood=neighborhood,
+                total_count=total_count
+            )
+
+        # 3. Property Detail
+        elif template_name.startswith("property_detail"):
+            property_id = request.args.get("id", type=int)
+            property_obj = None
+            if property_id:
+                property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+            if not property_obj:
+                # fallback to first active property
+                properties = database_service.get_properties(status="active")
+                if properties:
+                    property_obj = properties[0]
+                else:
+                    # fallback to any property
+                    all_props = Property.query.filter(Property.is_deleted.is_(False)).all()
+                    if all_props:
+                        property_obj = all_props[0]
+
+            if not property_obj:
+                return "No properties found in the database. Please add a property first.", 404
+
+            # Fetch agent & history
+            agent = property_obj.agent
+            history = database_service.get_property_history(property_obj.id)
+            ai_history = database_service.get_ai_history(property_obj.id)
+
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                property=property_obj,
+                agent=agent,
+                property_history=history,
+                ai_history=ai_history
+            )
+
+        # 4. Deals Kanban Board
+        elif template_name.startswith("deals_kanban"):
+            # Get all active/non-deleted deals
+            deals = database_service.get_deals()
+            
+            # Group into statuses: prospecting, leads, negotiation, under_contract, closed_won
+            kanban_data = {
+                "prospecting": [],
+                "leads": [],
+                "negotiation": [],
+                "under_contract": [],
+                "closed_won": []
+            }
+            
+            for deal in deals:
+                status = (deal.status or "").lower()
+                # Map standard status names to Kanban columns
+                if status in ("prospecting", "new"):
+                    kanban_data["prospecting"].append(deal)
+                elif status in ("leads", "qualified", "contacted"):
+                    kanban_data["leads"].append(deal)
+                elif status in ("negotiation", "proposal", "negotiating"):
+                    kanban_data["negotiation"].append(deal)
+                elif status in ("under_contract", "contract"):
+                    kanban_data["under_contract"].append(deal)
+                elif status in ("closed_won", "closed", "won"):
+                    kanban_data["closed_won"].append(deal)
+                else:
+                    # Default fallback
+                    kanban_data["prospecting"].append(deal)
+
+            # Calculate volumes for each column
+            volumes = {}
+            for col, col_deals in kanban_data.items():
+                volumes[col] = sum(d.offer_amount or 0 for d in col_deals)
+
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                kanban_data=kanban_data,
+                volumes=volumes,
+                total_deals_count=len(deals)
+            )
+
+        # 5. Recommendations / Recommendations Mobile
+        elif template_name.startswith("recommendations") or template_name.startswith("ai_matchmaker"):
+            # Support customer selection by query parameter 'customer_id' or 'customer'
+            customer_id = request.args.get("customer_id", type=int) or request.args.get("customer", type=int)
+            customers = database_service.get_customers()
+            selected_customer = None
+            if customer_id:
+                selected_customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+            if not selected_customer and customers:
+                # Default to the first customer so the page is populated
+                selected_customer = customers[0]
+            
+            recommendations_list = []
+            ai_service_available = True
+            error_message = None
+            recommendation_meta = {}
+            active_recommendation = None
+            outreach_pitch = ""
+            
+            if selected_customer:
+                properties = database_service.get_properties(status="active")
+                try:
+                    recommendations_list = gemini_service.get_property_recommendations(selected_customer, properties)
+                    recommendation_meta = {}
+                    meta_getter = getattr(gemini_service, "get_last_recommendation_meta", None)
+                    if callable(meta_getter):
+                        meta_candidate = meta_getter()
+                        if isinstance(meta_candidate, dict):
+                            recommendation_meta = meta_candidate
+                    is_fallback = bool(recommendation_meta.get("is_fallback", False))
+                    ai_service_available = not is_fallback
+                    error_message = recommendation_meta.get("message") if is_fallback else None
+                except Exception as e:
+                    recommendations_list = gemini_service._create_fallback_recommendations(selected_customer, properties)
+                    ai_service_available = False
+                    error_message = "AI service temporarily unavailable. Showing basic recommendations."
+                    recommendation_meta = {"is_fallback": True, "reason": "exception"}
+                
+                if recommendations_list:
+                    # Determine active recommendation (by query param property_id or defaulting to the first)
+                    active_property_id = request.args.get("property_id", type=int) or request.args.get("property", type=int)
+                    if active_property_id:
+                        for rec in recommendations_list:
+                            p = rec.get("property")
+                            p_id = getattr(p, "id", None) if p else None
+                            if p_id == active_property_id:
+                                active_recommendation = rec
+                                break
+                    if not active_recommendation:
+                        active_recommendation = recommendations_list[0]
+                    
+                    # Compute outreach pitch
+                    p_obj = active_recommendation.get("property")
+                    p_score = active_recommendation.get("match_score", 0)
+                    outreach_pitch = gemini_service.generate_matchmaker_pitch(
+                        customer=selected_customer,
+                        property_obj=p_obj,
+                        match_score=p_score,
+                        customer_score=p_score,
+                        property_score=p_score,
+                        smart_benefits=active_recommendation.get("pros", [])
+                    )
+
+            agents = database_service.get_agents()
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                customers=customers,
+                selected_customer=selected_customer,
+                recommendations=recommendations_list,
+                active_recommendation=active_recommendation,
+                outreach_pitch=outreach_pitch,
+                ai_service_available=ai_service_available,
+                error_message=error_message,
+                recommendation_meta=recommendation_meta,
+                agents=agents
+            )
+
+        # 6. Public Submit Property
+        elif template_name.startswith("public_submit_property"):
+            agents = database_service.get_agents()
+            return render_template(preview_file, agents=agents)
+
+        # 7. Customers / Lead scoring
+        elif template_name.startswith("customers"):
+            customers = database_service.get_customers()
+            from forms import CustomerForm
+            form = CustomerForm()
+            for customer in customers:
+                visible_deals = [d for d in customer.deals if not d.is_deleted]
+                setattr(customer, "total_deals", len(visible_deals))
+                setattr(
+                    customer,
+                    "active_deals",
+                    len([d for d in visible_deals if d.status not in ["closed_won", "closed_lost"]]),
+                )
+            return render_template(preview_file, customers=customers, form=form)
+
+        # 8. Tasks & Calendar
+        elif template_name.startswith("tasks"):
+            agent_id = request.args.get("agent", type=int)
+            status = request.args.get("status")
+            tasks = database_service.get_tasks(agent_id=agent_id, status=status)
+            agents = database_service.get_agents()
+            from forms import TaskForm
+            form = TaskForm()
+            
+            # Partition tasks for convenience in the preview UI
+            import datetime
+            now_date = datetime.date.today()
+            overdue_tasks = []
+            today_tasks = []
+            week_tasks = []
+            
+            for t in tasks:
+                t.agent_name = t.agent.name if t.agent else "Unknown"
+                if t.due_date:
+                    due_d = t.due_date.date() if isinstance(t.due_date, datetime.datetime) else t.due_date
+                    if due_d < now_date and t.status != "completed":
+                        overdue_tasks.append(t)
+                    elif due_d == now_date:
+                        today_tasks.append(t)
+                    else:
+                        week_tasks.append(t)
+                else:
+                    week_tasks.append(t)
+            
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                tasks=tasks,
+                overdue_tasks=overdue_tasks,
+                today_tasks=today_tasks,
+                week_tasks=week_tasks,
+                agents=agents,
+                form=form,
+                current_date=datetime.datetime.now()
+            )
+
+        # 9. SMS Broadcaster / Panel
+        elif template_name.startswith("sms_panel") or template_name.startswith("sms_broadcaster"):
+            from sqlalchemy_models import CustomerGroup
+            customers = database_service.get_customers()
+            groups = CustomerGroup.query.all()
+            for g in groups:
+                g.customer_count = len(g.customers) if g.customers else 0
+            
+            # Fetch last 20 SMS logs
+            from services.sms_service import sms_service
+            sms_logs = sms_service.get_history(limit=20)
+            
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                customers=customers,
+                groups=groups,
+                sms_logs=sms_logs
+            )
+
+        # 10. Admin Environment Variables
+        elif template_name.startswith("admin_environment"):
+            from services.environment_service import environment_service
+            variables = environment_service.get_all_variables(mask_sensitive=True)
+            validation_summary = environment_service.get_validation_summary()
+            from forms import EnvironmentVariableForm
+            form = EnvironmentVariableForm()
+            history = environment_service.get_change_history(limit=20)
+            
+            return render_template(
+                preview_file,
+                variables=variables,
+                validation_summary=validation_summary,
+                form=form,
+                history=history
+            )
+
+        # 11. Workflow Automations
+        elif template_name.startswith("admin_automations"):
+            from services.automation_service import automation_service
+            rules = automation_service.get_rules()
+            return render_template(preview_file, rules=rules)
+
+        # Fallback render (other static templates)
+        return render_template(preview_file)
+
+    except Exception as e:
+        import traceback
+        traceback.print_exc()
+        try:
+            from flask import current_app
+            previews_path = os.path.join(current_app.root_path, "templates", "stitch_previews")
+            available = [f.split(".")[0] for f in os.listdir(previews_path) if f.endswith(".html")]
+        except Exception:
+            available = ["dashboard", "dashboard_elite", "properties", "property_detail", "deals_kanban"]
+        return f"Error rendering preview '{template_name}': {str(e)}.<br>Available previews: {', '.join(available)}", 500
+

+@bp.route("/api/v1/chat/copilot", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def chat_copilot():
+    if "user_id" not in session:
+        return jsonify({"error": "unauthorized", "message": "Session expired."}), 401
+
+    data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
+    message = str(data.get("message") or "").strip()
+    history = data.get("history", [])
+    if not isinstance(history, list):
+        history = []
+    # Keep payload bounded to avoid runaway memory/cost across long sessions.
+    history = history[-20:]
+
+    if not message:
+        return jsonify({"error": "invalid_request", "message": "Message is required"}), 400
+    if len(message) > 2000:
+        return jsonify({"error": "invalid_request", "message": "Message is too long"}), 400
+
+    try:
+        from services.gemini_service import chat_with_agentic_rag
+    except Exception:
+        return jsonify({"error": "service_unavailable", "message": "Copilot service unavailable"}), 503
+
+    reply = chat_with_agentic_rag(message, history)
+    return jsonify({"reply": reply})
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/v1/integrations/maskan/status", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def maskan_live_status():
+    if "user_id" not in session:
+        return jsonify({"error": "unauthorized", "message": "Session expired."}), 401
+
+    from services.maskan_live_service import maskan_live_service
+
+    if not maskan_live_service.is_enabled:
+        return jsonify(
+            {
+                "enabled": False,
+                "message": "Maskan live API is not configured. Set MASKAN_LIVE_API_BASE_URL.",
+            }
+        )
+
+    health = maskan_live_service.health()
+    return jsonify(
+        {
+            "enabled": True,
+            "base_url": maskan_live_service.base_url,
+            "changes_endpoint": (
+                maskan_live_service.changes_paths[0]
+                if getattr(maskan_live_service, "changes_paths", None)
+                else "/api/v2/integrations/gptvli/properties/changes"
+            ),
+            "health": health,
+        }
+    )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/v1/integrations/maskan/sync", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def maskan_live_sync():
+    if "user_id" not in session:
+        return jsonify({"error": "unauthorized", "message": "Session expired."}), 401
+
+    from services.maskan_live_service import maskan_live_service
+
+    if not maskan_live_service.is_enabled:
+        return jsonify(
+            {
+                "error": "service_unavailable",
+                "message": "Maskan live API is not configured. Set MASKAN_LIVE_API_BASE_URL.",
+            }
+        ), 503
+
+    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _as_bool(value, default=False):
+        if isinstance(value, bool):
+            return value
+        if value in (None, ""):
+            return default
+        return str(value).strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on", "y"}
+
+    try:
+        max_pages = max(1, min(int(payload.get("max_pages", 1)), 20))
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        max_pages = 1
+    try:
+        page_size = max(1, min(int(payload.get("page_size", 200)), 5000))
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        page_size = 200
+    try:
+        limit = max(1, min(int(payload.get("limit", page_size)), 5000))
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        limit = page_size
+
+    listing_type = str(payload.get("listing_type") or "").strip().lower() or None
+    cursor = str(payload.get("cursor") or "").strip() or None
+    fetch_all = _as_bool(payload.get("fetch_all"), default=False)
+    include_pii = _as_bool(payload.get("include_pii"), default=False)
+    include_payload = _as_bool(payload.get("include_payload"), default=False)
+    try:
+        zone = int(payload["zone"]) if payload.get("zone") not in (None, "") else None
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        zone = None
+    overwrite = _as_bool(payload.get("overwrite"), default=True)
+
+    try:
+        result = maskan_live_service.sync_properties_to_local_db(
+            max_pages=max_pages,
+            page_size=page_size,
+            listing_type=listing_type,
+            zone=zone,
+            overwrite=overwrite,
+            cursor=cursor,
+            limit=limit,
+            fetch_all=fetch_all,
+            include_pii=include_pii,
+            include_payload=include_payload,
+        )
+    except Exception as exc:
+        return jsonify({"error": "sync_failed", "message": str(exc)}), 500
+
+    return jsonify({"status": "ok", "sync": result})
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/v1/copilot/matchmaker/<int:customer_id>", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def copilot_matchmaker(customer_id: int):
+    if "user_id" not in session:
+        return jsonify({"error": "unauthorized", "message": "Session expired."}), 401
+
+    customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+    if not customer:
+        return jsonify({"error": "not_found", "message": "Customer not found."}), 404
+
+    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
+    try:
+        max_results = max(1, min(int(payload.get("max_results", 3)), 10))
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        max_results = 3
+    try:
+        min_property_score = max(0, min(int(payload.get("min_property_score", 0)), 100))
+    except (TypeError, ValueError):
+        min_property_score = 0
+
+    try:
+        from services.proptech_scoring import (
+            build_matchmaker_pitch,
+            customer_priority_badge,
+            get_customer_score,
+            property_priority_badge,
+            rank_properties_for_customer,
+        )
+    except Exception:
+        return jsonify({"error": "service_unavailable", "message": "Matchmaker service unavailable."}), 503
+
+    customer_score = get_customer_score(customer)
+    matches = rank_properties_for_customer(
+        customer=customer,
+        max_results=max_results,
+        min_property_score=min_property_score,
+    )
+    customer_badge = customer_priority_badge(customer_score)
+
+    response_matches = []
+    for match in matches:
+        property_obj = match.get("property")
+        if not property_obj:
+            continue
+        property_score = int(match.get("property_score", 0))
+        response_matches.append(
+            {
+                "property_id": property_obj.id,
+                "title": property_obj.title,
+                "address": property_obj.address,
+                "price": property_obj.price,
+                "property_type": property_obj.property_type,
+                "bedrooms": property_obj.bedrooms,
+                "bathrooms": property_obj.bathrooms,
+                "square_feet": property_obj.square_feet,
+                "match_score": int(match.get("match_score", 0)),
+                "property_score": property_score,
+                "property_badge": property_priority_badge(property_score),
+                "smart_benefits": match.get("smart_benefits", []),
+                "trending_badges": match.get("trending_badges", []),
+            }
+        )
+
+    if not response_matches:
+        return jsonify(
+            {
+                "customer_id": customer.id,
+                "customer_name": customer.name,
+                "customer_score": customer_score,
+                "customer_badge": customer_badge,
+                "matches": [],
+                "sms_draft": "No high-confidence matches right now. I can re-run after new listings are indexed.",
+            }
+        )
+
+    top_match = matches[0]
+    top_property = top_match.get("property")
+    top_property_score = int(top_match.get("property_score", 0))
+    sms_draft = build_matchmaker_pitch(customer, top_match)
+
+    pitch_builder = getattr(gemini_service, "generate_matchmaker_pitch", None)
+    if callable(pitch_builder) and top_property is not None:
+        try:
+            candidate = pitch_builder(
+                customer=customer,
+                property_obj=top_property,
+                match_score=int(top_match.get("match_score", 0)),
+                customer_score=customer_score,
+                property_score=top_property_score,
+                smart_benefits=top_match.get("smart_benefits", []),
+            )
+            if isinstance(candidate, str) and candidate.strip():
+                sms_draft = candidate.strip()
+        except Exception:
+            pass
+
+    return jsonify(
+        {
+            "customer_id": customer.id,
+            "customer_name": customer.name,
+            "customer_score": customer_score,
+            "customer_badge": customer_badge,
+            "top_match": response_matches[0],
+            "matches": response_matches,
+            "sms_draft": sms_draft,
+        }
+    )
+
+@bp.route("/sms-panel")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def sms_panel():
+    """SMS panel page"""
+    from sqlalchemy_models import CustomerGroup
+    customers = database_service.get_customers()
+    groups = CustomerGroup.query.all()
+    # Add customer_count to groups for template
+    for g in groups:
+        g.customer_count = len(g.customers) if g.customers else 0
+    return render_template("sms_panel.html", customers=customers, groups=groups)
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/sms/send", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def queue_sms_messages():
+    """Queue outbound SMS messages for async processing."""
+    from services.sms_service import sms_service
+    from sqlalchemy_models import CustomerGroup
+
+    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) if request.is_json else request.form
+    if payload is None:
+        return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "Invalid request payload"}), 400
+
+    message = (payload.get("message") or "").strip()
+    provider = (payload.get("provider") or "").strip() or None
+    recipient_mode = (payload.get("recipient_mode") or "direct").strip().lower()
+    recipients = payload.get("recipients")
+
+    recipient_list = []
+    if isinstance(recipients, list):
+        recipient_list = recipients
+    elif isinstance(recipients, str) and recipients.strip():
+        recipient_list = [
+            part.strip() for part in recipients.replace("\r", "\n").replace(",", "\n").split("\n") if part.strip()
+        ]
+
+    if recipient_mode == "all":
+        customers = database_service.get_customers()
+        recipient_list = [c.phone for c in customers if getattr(c, "phone", None)]
+    elif recipient_mode == "group":
+        try:
+            group_id = int(payload.get("group_id"))
+        except (TypeError, ValueError):
+            group_id = None
+        if not group_id:
+            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "group_id is required for group mode"}), 400
+        group = CustomerGroup.query.get(group_id)
+        if not group:
+            return jsonify({"success": False, "error": "Customer group not found"}), 404
+        recipient_list = [c.phone for c in group.customers if getattr(c, "phone", None)]
+    elif recipient_mode == "custom":
+        custom_numbers = payload.get("custom_numbers")
+        if isinstance(custom_numbers, list):
+            recipient_list = custom_numbers
+        elif isinstance(custom_numbers, str):
+            recipient_list = [
+                part.strip()
+                for part in custom_numbers.replace("\r", "\n").replace(",", "\n").split("\n")
+                if part.strip()
+            ]
+
+    try:
+        queued = sms_service.queue_messages(
+            recipients=recipient_list,
+            message=message,
+            created_by_user_id=session.get("user_id"),
+            provider=provider,
+        )
+    except ValueError as exc:
+        return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 400
+    except Exception as exc:
+        return jsonify({"success": False, "error": str(exc)}), 500
+
+    return jsonify(
+        {
+            "success": True,
+            "queued_count": len(queued),
+            "messages": [m.to_dict() for m in queued],
+        }
+    )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/sms/history", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def sms_history():
+    """Read outbound SMS queue history."""
+    from services.sms_service import sms_service
+
+    status = (request.args.get("status") or "").strip() or None
+    limit = request.args.get("limit", type=int) or 20
+    messages = sms_service.get_history(limit=limit, status=status)
+
+    return jsonify(
+        {
+            "success": True,
+            "count": len(messages),
+            "messages": [m.to_dict() for m in messages],
+        }
+    )
+

+@bp.route("/api/customer-groups", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def add_customer_group():
+    """Create a customer group"""
+    from sqlalchemy_models import CustomerGroup
+    from database import db as _db
+    data = request.get_json()
+    if not data or not data.get("name"):
+        return jsonify({"error": "Group name is required"}), 400
+    try:
+        group = CustomerGroup(
+            name=data["name"],
+            color=data.get("color", "#6366f1"),
+            description=data.get("description", ""),
+        )
+        _db.session.add(group)
+        _db.session.commit()
+        return jsonify({"group": group.to_dict()}), 201
+    except Exception as e:
+        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 400
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/customer-groups/<int:group_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_customer_group(group_id):
+    """Delete a customer group"""
+    from sqlalchemy_models import CustomerGroup
+    from database import db as _db
+    group = CustomerGroup.query.get(group_id)
+    if not group:
+        return jsonify({"error": "Group not found"}), 404
+    _db.session.delete(group)
+    _db.session.commit()
+    return jsonify({"message": "Group deleted"})
+

+@bp.route("/settings/update", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_settings():
+    try:
+        # For demonstration, update the first agent
+        agents = database_service.get_agents()
+        if not agents:
+            flash("No agent profile found to update", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("main.settings"))
+            
+        agent = agents[0]
+        
+        # Update fields
+        name = request.form.get("name")
+        email = request.form.get("email")
+        phone = request.form.get("phone")
+        
+        # Simple validation
+        if not name or not email:
+            flash("Name and Email are required", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("main.settings"))
+            
+        # Update via service
+        database_service.update_agent(
+            agent.id,
+            name=name,
+            email=email,
+            phone=phone
+        )
+        
+        flash("Settings updated successfully", "success")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.settings"))
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        flash(f"Error updating settings: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.settings"))
+

+@bp.route("/recommendations/<int:customer_id>")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def get_customer_recommendations(customer_id: int):
+    """Generate and display AI-powered property recommendations for a specific customer"""
+    # Validate customer exists
+    customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+    if not customer:
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": "Customer not found", "customer_id": customer_id}), 404
+
+        flash("Customer not found", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+    
+    try:
+        # Get all customers for the selection area
+        customers = database_service.get_customers()
+        agents = database_service.get_agents()
+        
+        # Get available properties
+        properties = database_service.get_properties(status="active")
+        
+        # Generate recommendations using the application service
+        try:
+            recommendation_request = RecommendationRequest(
+                customer_id=customer_id,
+                limit=10
+            )
+            recommendation_results = recommendation_service.get_recommendations(recommendation_request)
+
+            # Extract property IDs for bulk fetch
+            property_ids = [result.property_id for result in recommendation_results]
+            properties_map = {}
+            if property_ids:
+                properties_list = db.session.query(Property).filter(Property.id.in_(property_ids)).all()
+                properties_map = {p.id: p for p in properties_list}
+
+            # Convert to the format expected by the template
+            recommendations = []
+            for result in recommendation_results:
+                prop = properties_map.get(result.property_id)
+                if not prop:
+                    continue
+                recommendations.append({
+                    "property": prop,
+                    "analysis": result.analysis,
+                    "pros": result.pros,
+                    "cons": result.cons,
+                    "match_score": result.match_score,
+                    "hybrid_breakdown": result.hybrid_breakdown,
+                })
+
+            # We don't have the recommendation_meta from the gemini_service anymore, so we'll set default values
+            recommendation_meta = {
+                "is_fallback": False,
+                "reason": None,
+                "search_mode": "application_service",
+            }
+            ai_service_available = True
+            error_message = None
+        except Exception as e:
+            # Fallback to basic recommendations if the application service fails
+            import logging
+            logging.error(f"Error in recommendation service: {str(e)}")
+            recommendations = gemini_service._create_fallback_recommendations(customer, properties)
+            ai_service_available = False
+            error_message = "Recommendation service temporarily unavailable. Showing basic recommendations."
+            recommendation_meta = {
+                "is_fallback": True,
+                "reason": "recommendation_service_exception",
+                "search_mode": "keyword_only",
+            }
+        
+        return render_template(
+            "recommendations.html",
+            customers=customers,
+            agents=agents,
+            selected_customer=customer,
+            recommendations=recommendations,
+            ai_service_available=ai_service_available,
+            error_message=error_message,
+            recommendation_meta=recommendation_meta,
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        # Log error and show user-friendly message
+        import logging
+        logging.error(f"Error generating recommendations for customer {customer_id}: {str(e)}")
+        
+        customers = database_service.get_customers()
+        agents = database_service.get_agents()
+        
+        return render_template(
+            "recommendations.html",
+            customers=customers,
+            agents=agents,
+            selected_customer=None,
+            recommendations=None,
+            ai_service_available=False,
+            error_message="An error occurred while generating recommendations. Please try again.",
+            recommendation_meta={
+                "is_fallback": True,
+                "reason": "route_exception",
+                "search_mode": "keyword_only",
+            },
+        )

+@bp.route("/api/ai/parse/property", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def api_parse_property():
+    """Extract property information from free text using Gemini AI"""
+    try:
+        data = request.get_json()
+        if not data or "text" not in data:
+            return jsonify({"error": "No text provided"}), 400
+        
+        text = data["text"]
+        result = gemini_service.extract_property_from_text(text)
+        return jsonify(result)
+    except Exception as e:
+        import logging
+        logging.error(f"Error parsing property text: {str(e)}")
+        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+
+

+def api_parse_customer():

+        
+        text = data["text"]
+        result = gemini_service.extract_customer_from_text(text)
+        return jsonify(result)
     except Exception as e:
+        import logging
+        logging.error(f"Error parsing customer text: {str(e)}")
         return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

+@bp.route("/recommendations/export")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def export_recommendations():
+    """Generate and export recommendations report in PDF or Excel format"""
+    try:
+        # Get parameters
+        customer_id = request.args.get("customer_id", type=int)
+        export_format = request.args.get("format", "pdf").lower()
+        
+        # Validate customer if provided
+        customer = None
+        if customer_id:
+            customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+            if not customer:
+                flash("Customer not found", "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+        
+        # Get export data
+        export_data = database_service.export_recommendations_data(customer_id)
+
+        # XHR/API clients expect JSON payload, not a file download.
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify(export_data)
+        
+        if export_format == "pdf":
+            return _generate_pdf_report(export_data, customer)
+        elif export_format == "excel":
+            return _generate_excel_report(export_data, customer)
+        elif export_format == "json":
+            return _generate_json_report(export_data, customer)
+        else:
+            flash("Invalid export format", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+            
+    except Exception as e:
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error generating report: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>/schedule-viewing", methods=["GET", "POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def schedule_viewing(property_id: int):
+    """Display property viewing scheduling interface"""
+    try:
+        # Validate property exists
+        property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+        if not property_obj:
+            return jsonify({"error": "Property not found"}), 404
+        
+        # Get customers and agents for the form
+        customers = database_service.get_customers()
+        agents = database_service.get_agents()
+
+        if request.method == "POST":
+            payload = request.get_json(silent=True) if request.is_json else request.form
+            customer_id_raw = payload.get("customer_id") if payload else None
+            agent_id_raw = payload.get("agent_id") if payload else None
+            viewing_date = (payload.get("viewing_date") if payload else "") or ""
+            viewing_time = (payload.get("viewing_time") if payload else "") or ""
+            viewing_duration = (payload.get("viewing_duration") if payload else "") or ""
+            viewing_type = (payload.get("viewing_type") if payload else "") or ""
+            special_requirements = (payload.get("special_requirements") if payload else "") or ""
+            send_notifications_raw = (payload.get("send_notifications") if payload else "") or ""
+
+            try:
+                customer_id = int(customer_id_raw) if customer_id_raw not in (None, "") else None
+                agent_id = int(agent_id_raw) if agent_id_raw not in (None, "") else None
+            except (TypeError, ValueError):
+                customer_id = None
+                agent_id = None
+
+            if not customer_id or not agent_id or not viewing_date or not viewing_time:
+                message = "Missing required fields."
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": message}), 400
+                flash(message, "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+            customer = database_service.get_customer(customer_id)
+            if not customer:
+                message = "Customer not found."
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": message}), 404
+                flash(message, "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+            agent = database_service.get_agent(agent_id)
+            if not agent:
+                message = "Agent not found."
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": message}), 404
+                flash(message, "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+            try:
+                due_date = datetime.strptime(f"{viewing_date} {viewing_time}", "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
+            except ValueError:
+                message = "Invalid viewing date/time."
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": message}), 400
+                flash(message, "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+            if due_date < datetime.now():
+                message = "Viewing date/time cannot be in the past."
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": message}), 400
+                flash(message, "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+            send_notifications = str(send_notifications_raw).lower() in ("1", "true", "on", "yes")
+            duration_label = f"{viewing_duration} minutes" if viewing_duration else "unspecified duration"
+            viewing_type_label = viewing_type or "in-person"
+            title = f"Viewing: {property_obj.title}"
+            description_lines = [
+                f"Property: {property_obj.title}",
+                f"Address: {property_obj.address}",
+                f"Customer: {customer.name} ({customer.email})",
+                f"Viewing: {viewing_date} {viewing_time} ({duration_label}, {viewing_type_label})",
+            ]
+            if special_requirements:
+                description_lines.append(f"Notes: {special_requirements}")
+            description_lines.append(f"Notifications: {'enabled' if send_notifications else 'disabled'}")
+            description = "\n".join(description_lines)
+
+            task = database_service.add_task(
+                title=title,
+                description=description,
+                agent_id=agent_id,
+                priority="medium",
+                status="pending",
+                due_date=due_date,
+            )
+
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"success": True, "task": task.to_dict()}), 200
+            flash("Viewing scheduled successfully.", "success")
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+
+        # Return JSON when explicitly requested, otherwise render HTML partial for modal usage.
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify(
+                {
+                    "property": property_obj.to_dict(),
+                    "customers": [c.to_dict() for c in customers],
+                    "agents": [a.to_dict() for a in agents],
+                }
+            )
+
+        close_modal_id = request.args.get("close_modal_id") or "auxModal"
+        today = datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None).date().isoformat()
+        return render_template(
+            "modals/viewing_schedule_modal.html",
+            property=property_obj,
+            customers=customers,
+            agents=agents,
+            close_modal_id=close_modal_id,
+            today=today,
+        )
+         
+    except Exception as e:
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error loading viewing schedule: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _generate_pdf_report(export_data, customer=None):
+    """Generate PDF report for recommendations"""
+    try:
+        from reportlab.lib.pagesizes import letter, A4
+        from reportlab.platypus import SimpleDocTemplate, Paragraph, Spacer, Table, TableStyle
+        from reportlab.lib.styles import getSampleStyleSheet, ParagraphStyle
+        from reportlab.lib.units import inch
+        from reportlab.lib import colors
+        
+        # Create a temporary file
+        temp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix='.pdf')
+        
+        # Create the PDF document
+        doc = SimpleDocTemplate(temp_file.name, pagesize=A4)
+        styles = getSampleStyleSheet()
+        story = []
+        
+        # Title
+        title_style = ParagraphStyle(
+            'CustomTitle',
+            parent=styles['Heading1'],
+            fontSize=18,
+            spaceAfter=30,
+            alignment=1  # Center alignment
+        )
+        
+        title_text = "Property Recommendations Report"
+        if customer:
+            title_text += f" - {customer.name}"
+        
+        story.append(Paragraph(title_text, title_style))
+        story.append(Spacer(1, 12))
+        
+        # Report info
+        info_style = styles['Normal']
+        story.append(Paragraph(f"Generated: {datetime.now().strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')}", info_style))
+        story.append(Paragraph(f"Total Properties: {export_data['total_properties']}", info_style))
+        story.append(Spacer(1, 20))
+        
+        # Customer info if provided
+        if customer:
+            story.append(Paragraph("Customer Information", styles['Heading2']))
+            customer_info = [
+                f"Name: {customer.name}",
+                f"Email: {customer.email}",
+                f"Phone: {customer.phone}",
+            ]
+            if customer.budget_min > 0 or customer.budget_max > 0:
+                budget_text = f"Budget: ${customer.budget_min:,.0f}"
+                if customer.budget_max > 0:
+                    budget_text += f" - ${customer.budget_max:,.0f}"
+                customer_info.append(budget_text)
+            
+            if customer.preferred_bedrooms > 0:
+                customer_info.append(f"Preferred Bedrooms: {customer.preferred_bedrooms}")
+            if customer.preferred_type:
+                customer_info.append(f"Preferred Type: {customer.preferred_type}")
+            if customer.location_preference:
+                customer_info.append(f"Location Preference: {customer.location_preference}")
+            
+            for info in customer_info:
+                story.append(Paragraph(info, info_style))
+            story.append(Spacer(1, 20))
+        
+        # Properties table
+        if export_data['properties']:
+            story.append(Paragraph("Property Listings", styles['Heading2']))
+            story.append(Spacer(1, 12))
+            
+            # Table headers
+            table_data = [
+                ['Title', 'Address', 'Price', 'Type', 'Beds', 'Baths', 'Sq Ft', 'Agent']
+            ]
+            
+            # Table rows
+            for prop in export_data['properties']:
+                row = [
+                    prop.get('title', '')[:30] + ('...' if len(prop.get('title', '')) > 30 else ''),
+                    prop.get('address', '')[:40] + ('...' if len(prop.get('address', '')) > 40 else ''),
+                    f"${prop.get('price', 0):,.0f}",
+                    prop.get('property_type', ''),
+                    str(prop.get('bedrooms', 0)),
+                    str(prop.get('bathrooms', 0)),
+                    f"{prop.get('square_feet', 0):,}",
+                    prop.get('agent_name', 'N/A')[:15] + ('...' if len(prop.get('agent_name', '')) > 15 else '')
+                ]
+                table_data.append(row)
+            
+            # Create table
+            table = Table(table_data, colWidths=[1.2*inch, 1.5*inch, 0.8*inch, 0.7*inch, 0.4*inch, 0.4*inch, 0.6*inch, 0.8*inch])
+            table.setStyle(TableStyle([
+                ('BACKGROUND', (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.grey),
+                ('TEXTCOLOR', (0, 0), (-1, 0), colors.whitesmoke),
+                ('ALIGN', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 'CENTER'),
+                ('FONTNAME', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 'Helvetica-Bold'),
+                ('FONTSIZE', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 10),
+                ('BOTTOMPADDING', (0, 0), (-1, 0), 12),
+                ('BACKGROUND', (0, 1), (-1, -1), colors.beige),
+                ('FONTSIZE', (0, 1), (-1, -1), 8),
+                ('GRID', (0, 0), (-1, -1), 1, colors.black)
+            ]))
+            
+            story.append(table)
+        
+        # Build PDF
+        doc.build(story)
+        
+        # Prepare file for download
+        temp_file.seek(0)
+        filename = f"recommendations_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.pdf"
+        
+        return send_file(
+            temp_file.name,
+            # Prefer inline display to avoid download-manager/extension interception of attachments.
+            as_attachment=False,
+            download_name=filename,
+            mimetype='application/pdf'
+        )
+        
+    except ImportError:
+        flash("PDF generation not available. Please install reportlab package.", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+    except Exception as e:
+        flash(f"Error generating PDF: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _generate_excel_report(export_data, customer=None):
+    """Generate Excel report for recommendations"""
+    try:
+        from openpyxl import Workbook
+        from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill, Alignment
+        from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
+        
+        # Create workbook
+        wb = Workbook()
+        ws = wb.active
+        ws.title = "Recommendations Report"
+        
+        # Title
+        title_text = "Property Recommendations Report"
+        if customer:
+            title_text += f" - {customer.name}"
+        
+        ws['A1'] = title_text
+        ws['A1'].font = Font(size=16, bold=True)
+        ws.merge_cells('A1:H1')
+        ws['A1'].alignment = Alignment(horizontal='center')
+        
+        # Report info
+        row = 3
+        ws[f'A{row}'] = f"Generated: {datetime.now().strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p')}"
+        row += 1
+        ws[f'A{row}'] = f"Total Properties: {export_data['total_properties']}"
+        row += 2
+        
+        # Customer info if provided
+        if customer:
+            ws[f'A{row}'] = "Customer Information"
+            ws[f'A{row}'].font = Font(bold=True)
+            row += 1
+            
+            customer_info = [
+                f"Name: {customer.name}",
+                f"Email: {customer.email}",
+                f"Phone: {customer.phone}",
+            ]
+            if customer.budget_min > 0 or customer.budget_max > 0:
+                budget_text = f"Budget: ${customer.budget_min:,.0f}"
+                if customer.budget_max > 0:
+                    budget_text += f" - ${customer.budget_max:,.0f}"
+                customer_info.append(budget_text)
+            
+            if customer.preferred_bedrooms > 0:
+                customer_info.append(f"Preferred Bedrooms: {customer.preferred_bedrooms}")
+            if customer.preferred_type:
+                customer_info.append(f"Preferred Type: {customer.preferred_type}")
+            if customer.location_preference:
+                customer_info.append(f"Location Preference: {customer.location_preference}")
+            
+            for info in customer_info:
+                ws[f'A{row}'] = info
+                row += 1
+            row += 1
+        
+        # Properties table
+        if export_data['properties']:
+            ws[f'A{row}'] = "Property Listings"
+            ws[f'A{row}'].font = Font(bold=True)
+            row += 1
+            
+            # Headers
+            headers = ['Title', 'Address', 'Price', 'Type', 'Bedrooms', 'Bathrooms', 'Square Feet', 'Agent', 'Agent Email', 'Agent Phone']
+            for col, header in enumerate(headers, 1):
+                cell = ws.cell(row=row, column=col, value=header)
+                cell.font = Font(bold=True)
+                cell.fill = PatternFill(start_color="CCCCCC", end_color="CCCCCC", fill_type="solid")
+            row += 1
+            
+            # Data rows
+            for prop in export_data['properties']:
+                data = [
+                    prop.get('title', ''),
+                    prop.get('address', ''),
+                    prop.get('price', 0),
+                    prop.get('property_type', ''),
+                    prop.get('bedrooms', 0),
+                    prop.get('bathrooms', 0),
+                    prop.get('square_feet', 0),
+                    prop.get('agent_name', 'N/A'),
+                    prop.get('agent_email', 'N/A'),
+                    prop.get('agent_phone', 'N/A')
+                ]
+                
+                for col, value in enumerate(data, 1):
+                    ws.cell(row=row, column=col, value=value)
+                row += 1
+            
+            # Auto-adjust column widths
+            for col in range(1, len(headers) + 1):
+                column_letter = get_column_letter(col)
+                ws.column_dimensions[column_letter].width = 15
+        
+        # Save to temporary file
+        temp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=False, suffix='.xlsx')
+        wb.save(temp_file.name)
+        
+        filename = f"recommendations_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.xlsx"
+        
+        return send_file(
+            temp_file.name,
+            as_attachment=True,
+            download_name=filename,
+            mimetype='application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet'
+        )
+        
+    except ImportError:
+        flash("Excel generation not available. Please install openpyxl package.", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+    except Exception as e:
+        flash(f"Error generating Excel: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _generate_json_report(export_data, customer=None):
+    """Generate JSON report for recommendations"""
+    try:
+        # Add customer info to export data if provided
+        if customer:
+            export_data['customer_info'] = customer.to_dict()
+        
+        # Create JSON response
+        json_str = json.dumps(export_data, indent=2, default=str)
+        
+        # Create temporary file
+        temp_file = tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', delete=False, suffix='.json')
+        temp_file.write(json_str)
+        temp_file.close()
+        
+        filename = f"recommendations_report_{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')}.json"
+        
+        return send_file(
+            temp_file.name,
+            as_attachment=True,
+            download_name=filename,
+            mimetype='application/json'
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        flash(f"Error generating JSON: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("main.recommendations"))

+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def rate_limit(max_requests=10, window_minutes=1):
+    """
+    Redis-backed rate limiting decorator.
+    Args:
+        max_requests: Maximum number of requests allowed
+        window_minutes: Time window in minutes
+    """
+    return limiter.limit(f"{max_requests} per {window_minutes} minute")

+@log_execution

+def _is_mobile_view():
+    return request.args.get("mobile", "").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}

+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _is_mock_value(value):
+    return value is not None and value.__class__.__module__.startswith("unittest.mock")
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _safe_attr(obj, field_name, default=None):
+    value = getattr(obj, field_name, default)
+    if _is_mock_value(value):
+        return default
+    return value
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _format_datetime(value, fallback="Unknown"):
+    if value is None:
+        return fallback
+    if hasattr(value, "strftime"):
+        try:
+            return value.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
+        except Exception:
+            return fallback
+    if isinstance(value, str):
+        return value
+    return fallback
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _normalize_numeric_input(raw_value):
+    if raw_value is None:
+        return None
+    normalized = str(raw_value).strip()
+    if normalized == "":
+        return ""
+    normalized = normalized.translate(str.maketrans("۰۱۲۳۴۵۶۷۸۹", "0123456789"))
+    normalized = normalized.replace(",", "").replace("_", "").replace(" ", "")
+    normalized = normalized.replace("٬", "").replace("،", "")
+    return normalized
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _parse_optional_toman(raw_value, field_label):
+    normalized = _normalize_numeric_input(raw_value)
+    if normalized in (None, ""):
+        return None
+    try:
+        return int(round(float(normalized)))
+    except (ValueError, TypeError):
+        raise PropertyValidationError(f"Invalid pricing data: {field_label} must be a valid integer amount in toman")
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _serialize_property_for_json(property_obj):
+    deals = _safe_attr(property_obj, "deals", []) or []
+    if _is_mock_value(deals):
+        deals = []
+
+    active_deals = 0
+    for deal in deals:
+        deal_status = getattr(deal, "status", None)
+        if deal_status not in ["closed_won", "closed_lost"]:
+            active_deals += 1
+
+    agent = _safe_attr(property_obj, "agent", None)
+    agent_name = _safe_attr(agent, "name", "Unassigned") if agent else "Unassigned"
+    agent_email = _safe_attr(agent, "email", "") if agent else ""
+    agent_phone = _safe_attr(agent, "phone", "") if agent else ""
+
+    return {
+        "id": _safe_attr(property_obj, "id", None),
+        "title": _safe_attr(property_obj, "title", "Untitled Property") or "Untitled Property",
+        "address": _safe_attr(property_obj, "address", "Address not available") or "Address not available",
+        "price": _safe_attr(property_obj, "price", 0) or 0,
+        "property_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_type", "Unknown") or "Unknown",
+        "bedrooms": _safe_attr(property_obj, "bedrooms", 0) or 0,
+        "bathrooms": _safe_attr(property_obj, "bathrooms", 0) or 0,
+        "square_feet": _safe_attr(property_obj, "square_feet", 0) or 0,
+        "description": _safe_attr(property_obj, "description", "No description available") or "No description available",
+        "status": _safe_attr(property_obj, "status", "unknown") or "unknown",
+        "year_built": _safe_attr(property_obj, "year_built", None),
+        "parking_spaces": _safe_attr(property_obj, "parking_spaces", 0) or 0,
+        "floors": _safe_attr(property_obj, "floors", 1) or 1,

+        "cooling_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "cooling_type", "") or "",

+        "built_area": _safe_attr(property_obj, "built_area", None),
+        "land_area": _safe_attr(property_obj, "land_area", None),
+        "floor_covering": _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_covering", None),
+        "facade_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "facade_type", None),
+        "wall_covering": _safe_attr(property_obj, "wall_covering", None),
+        "cabinet_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "cabinet_type", None),
+        "property_direction": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_direction", None),
+        "is_exchangeable": bool(_safe_attr(property_obj, "is_exchangeable", False)),
+        "boundary_width": _safe_attr(property_obj, "boundary_width", None),
+        "density": _safe_attr(property_obj, "density", None),
+        "commercial_status": _safe_attr(property_obj, "commercial_status", None),
+        "usage_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "usage_type", None),

+        "agent_name": agent_name,

+        "total_deals": len(deals),

+        "image_filename": _safe_attr(property_obj, "image_filename", None),

+            if _safe_attr(property_obj, "id", None)
+            else None
+        ),
+    }

+@bp.route("/properties/map")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def map_view():
+    """Interactive map view of all properties with location data"""
+    import json as _json
+    all_properties = Property.query.filter(Property.is_deleted.is_(False)).all()
+    properties_json = _json.dumps([
+        {
+            "id": p.id,
+            "title": p.title,
+            "address": p.address,
+            "price": p.price,
+            "property_type": p.property_type,
+            "listing_type": p.listing_type,
+            "rahn": p.rahn,
+            "ejare": p.ejare,
+            "bedrooms": p.bedrooms,
+            "square_feet": p.square_feet,
+            "latitude": p.latitude,
+            "longitude": p.longitude,
+            "file_code": p.file_code,
+            "has_elevator": p.has_elevator,
+            "has_storage": p.has_storage,
+            "image_filename": p.image_filename,
+        }
+        for p in all_properties
+    ])
+    return render_template("map_view.html", properties_json=properties_json)

+@bp.route("/api/properties/<int:property_id>/reveal-contact", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def reveal_contact(property_id):
+    """Track when a user reveals contact info for a property"""
+    from sqlalchemy_models import ContactReveal
+    property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+    if not property_obj:
+        return safe_json_response(message="Property not found", status=404)
+    try:
+        reveal = ContactReveal(
+            property_id=property_id,
+            viewer_ip=request.remote_addr,
+        )
+        db.session.add(reveal)
+        db.session.commit()
+        agent = property_obj.agent
+        contact_info = {
+            "agent_name": agent.name if agent else None,
+            "agent_phone": agent.phone if agent else None,
+            "agent_email": agent.email if agent else None,
+        }
+        return safe_json_response(data={"contact": contact_info})
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.error(f"Error revealing contact for property {property_id}: {e}")
+        return safe_json_response(message=str(e), status=500)
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/properties/smart-search")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def smart_search():
+    """Semantic search for properties using vector embeddings"""
+    query = request.args.get("q", "")
+    if not query:
+        return safe_json_response(data={"properties": []})
+        
+    try:
+        # Get all properties for the vector service to filter/rank
+        all_properties = database_service.get_properties()
+        
+        # Use vector service to find semantic matches
+        # We'll mock a Customer object to satisfy the signature if needed, 
+        # or update vector_service to accept a raw query string.
+        # Actually, vector_service.search_properties(customer, properties) uses customer.preferences.
+        # Let's see if vector_service has a direct query method.
+        # Looking at vector_service.py... it has search_properties(self, customer, properties, top_k=5)
+        
+        # For now, let's just use the query string directly if we can, 
+        # or create a dummy customer.
+        class DummyCustomer:
+            def __init__(self, query):
+                self.preferences = query
+                self.budget_min = 0
+                self.budget_max = 1000000000
+                self.preferred_bedrooms = 0
+                self.preferred_bathrooms = 0
+                self.preferred_type = ""
+                self.location_preference = ""
+        
+        dummy = DummyCustomer(query)
+        results = vector_service.search_properties(dummy, all_properties, top_k=20)
+        
+        formatted_results = []
+        for res in results:
+            p = res["property"]
+            formatted_results.append({
+                "id": p.id,
+                "title": p.title,
+                "address": p.address,
+                "price": p.price,
+                "property_type": p.property_type,
+                "bedrooms": p.bedrooms,
+                "bathrooms": p.bathrooms,
+                "square_feet": p.square_feet,
+                "score": res.get("score", 0),
+                "image_filename": p.image_filename
+            })
+            
+        return safe_json_response(data={"properties": formatted_results})
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.error(f"Smart Search failed: {e}")
+        return safe_json_response(message=f"Smart Search failed: {str(e)}", status=500)
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/extract-from-image", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def extract_property_from_image():
+    if "image" not in request.files:
+        return jsonify({"error": "No image uploaded"}), 400
+    
+    file = request.files["image"]
+    if file.filename == "":
+        return jsonify({"error": "No file selected"}), 400
+        
+    if file:
+        try:
+            image_bytes = file.read()
+            mime_type = file.mimetype or "image/jpeg"
+            data = gemini_service.extract_property_from_image(image_bytes, mime_type)
+            return jsonify(data)
+        except Exception as e:
+            logging.error(f"Image extraction error: {e}")
+            return jsonify({"error": "Failed to extract data"}), 500
+            
+    return jsonify({"error": "Unknown error"}), 400
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/extract-from-text", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def extract_property_from_text():
+    payload = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
+    text = (payload.get("text") or "").strip()
+    if not text:
+        return jsonify({"error": "No text provided"}), 400
+
+    try:
+        result = gemini_service.extract_property_from_text(text)
+        # extract_property_from_text returns {entity, data: {...}, missing, confidence}
+        # The frontend expects a flat dict of property fields (same as image endpoint)
+        data = result.get("data", {}) if isinstance(result, dict) else {}
+        return jsonify(data)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.error(f"Text extraction error: {e}")
+        return jsonify({"error": "Failed to extract data"}), 500
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>/ai-history", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def get_property_ai_history(property_id):
+    """Get AI extraction history for a property"""
+    history = database_service.get_ai_history(property_id)
+    return jsonify([h.to_dict() for h in history])

+@bp.route("/properties/ai-history/<int:history_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_property_ai_history(history_id):
+    """Delete an AI extraction history record"""
+    success = database_service.delete_ai_history(history_id)
+    if success:
+        return jsonify({"success": True})
+    return jsonify({"error": "Failed to delete history"}), 400

+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>", methods=["GET"])

+@require_property_exists
+@log_property_operation("view_property_modal")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def view_property(property_id, property_obj):

+    property_data = _serialize_property_for_json(property_obj)

+    if _wants_json():
+        return jsonify({"property": property_data}), 200
+
+    return render_template("modals/property_view_modal.html", property=property_data)

+@bp.route("/properties/<property_id>/detail")
+@handle_property_errors
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@validate_property_id
+@log_property_operation("view_property_detail")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def property_detail(property_id):
+    """Full property details page with enhanced features and robust error handling"""
+    # Use module-level symbol so tests can patch views.properties.get_property_with_related_data.
+    property_obj = get_property_with_related_data(property_id)
+
+    # Access checks are best-effort and should not break rendering in degraded test/runtime states.
+    try:
+        if hasattr(database_service, "validate_property_access"):
+            database_service.validate_property_access(property_id)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.warning(f"Property access validation degraded for {property_id}: {str(e)}")
+
+    # Calculate additional property statistics with safe access
+    total_deals = 0
+    active_deals = 0
+    recent_activity = None
+
+    try:
+        deals = [d for d in (_safe_attr(property_obj, "deals", []) or []) if not getattr(d, "is_deleted", False)]
+        total_deals = len(deals)
+        active_deals = len([d for d in deals if getattr(d, "status", None) not in ["closed_won", "closed_lost"]])
+
+        if deals:
+            recent_deal = max(
+                deals,
+                key=lambda d: getattr(d, "updated_at", None) or getattr(d, "created_at", None),
+            )
+            recent_activity = {
+                "type": "deal",
+                "status": getattr(recent_deal, "status", None),
+                "date": getattr(recent_deal, "updated_at", None) or getattr(recent_deal, "created_at", None),
+            }
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.warning(f"Error calculating deal statistics for property {property_id}: {str(e)}")
+
+    try:
+        related_properties = database_service.get_related_properties(property_id, limit=4)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.warning(f"Error loading related properties for {property_id}: {str(e)}")
+        related_properties = []
+
+    title = _safe_attr(property_obj, "title", f"Property #{property_id}") or f"Property #{property_id}"
+    neighborhood = _safe_attr(property_obj, "neighborhood", "Unknown") or "Unknown"
+    property_type = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_type", "Unknown") or "Unknown"
+    price = _safe_attr(property_obj, "price", 0) or 0
+    bedrooms = _safe_attr(property_obj, "bedrooms", 0) or 0
+    bathrooms = _safe_attr(property_obj, "bathrooms", 0) or 0
+    square_feet = _safe_attr(property_obj, "square_feet", 0) or 0
+    listing_type = _safe_attr(property_obj, "listing_type", "sale") or "sale"
+    status = _safe_attr(property_obj, "status", "unknown") or "unknown"
+    created_at = _safe_attr(property_obj, "created_at", None)
+    updated_at = _safe_attr(property_obj, "updated_at", None)
+    agent = _safe_attr(property_obj, "agent", None)
+
+    if isinstance(price, (int, float)) and price:
+        meta_description = (
+            f"{property_type} in {neighborhood}. "
+            f"{bedrooms} bed, {bathrooms} bath. ${price:,.0f}"
+        )
+    else:
+        meta_description = f"{property_type} in {neighborhood}"
+
+    property_data = {
+        "id": _safe_attr(property_obj, "id", property_id),
+        "title": title,
+        "address": _safe_attr(property_obj, "address", "Address not available") or "Address not available",
+        "price": price,
+        "property_type": property_type,
+        "bedrooms": bedrooms,
+        "bathrooms": bathrooms,
+        "square_feet": square_feet,
+        "description": _safe_attr(property_obj, "description", "No description available") or "No description available",
+        "status": status,
+        "year_built": _safe_attr(property_obj, "year_built", None),
+        "parking_spaces": _safe_attr(property_obj, "parking_spaces", 0) or 0,
+        "floors": _safe_attr(property_obj, "floors", 1) or 1,
+        "units": _safe_attr(property_obj, "units", 1) or 1,
+        "property_condition": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_condition", "unknown") or "unknown",
+        "heating_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "heating_type", "") or "",
+        "cooling_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "cooling_type", "") or "",
+        "neighborhood": neighborhood,
+        "property_category": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_category", "residential") or "residential",
+        "listing_type": listing_type,
+        "rahn": _safe_attr(property_obj, "rahn", None),
+        "ejare": _safe_attr(property_obj, "ejare", None),
+        "property_features": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_features", "") or "",
+        "document_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "document_type", None),
+        "floor_number": _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_number", None),
+        "built_area": _safe_attr(property_obj, "built_area", None),
+        "land_area": _safe_attr(property_obj, "land_area", None),
+        "floor_covering": _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_covering", None),
+        "facade_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "facade_type", None),
+        "wall_covering": _safe_attr(property_obj, "wall_covering", None),
+        "cabinet_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "cabinet_type", None),
+        "property_direction": _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_direction", None),
+        "is_exchangeable": bool(_safe_attr(property_obj, "is_exchangeable", False)),
+        "boundary_width": _safe_attr(property_obj, "boundary_width", None),
+        "density": _safe_attr(property_obj, "density", None),
+        "commercial_status": _safe_attr(property_obj, "commercial_status", None),
+        "usage_type": _safe_attr(property_obj, "usage_type", None),
+        "ceiling_count": _safe_attr(property_obj, "ceiling_count", None),
+        "permit_ceiling": _safe_attr(property_obj, "permit_ceiling", None),

+        "updated_at": _format_datetime(updated_at, fallback=None),
