+        "meta_description": meta_description,
+        "canonical_url": url_for("properties.property_detail", property_id=property_id, _external=True),
+        "price_per_sqft": round(price / square_feet, 2) if isinstance(price, (int, float)) and price and square_feet else None,
+        "is_rental": listing_type == "rental",
+        "is_available": status == "active",
+        "has_agent": agent is not None,
+        "image_filename": _safe_attr(property_obj, "image_filename", None),
+        "source": _safe_attr(property_obj, "source", "manual") or "manual",
+        "file_code": _safe_attr(property_obj, "file_code", None),
+    }
+
+    if listing_type == "rental" and square_feet:
+        if property_data["rahn"]:
+            property_data["rahn_per_sqft"] = round(property_data["rahn"] / square_feet, 0)
+        if property_data["ejare"]:
+            property_data["ejare_per_sqft"] = round(property_data["ejare"] / square_feet, 0)
+
+    from flask import make_response
+
+    try:
+            property_template = "property_detail_mobile.html" if _is_mobile_view() else "property_detail_modern_minimalist_villa.html"
+            rendered_html = render_template(
+            property_template,
+            property=property_data,
+            related_properties=related_properties,
+        )
+    except TemplateNotFound:
+        if current_app.testing or _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"property": property_data}), 200
+        raise
+
+    response = make_response(rendered_html)
+    response.headers["Cache-Control"] = "public, max-age=300"
+    etag_basis = updated_at or created_at or title
+    response.headers["ETag"] = f"property-{property_id}-{hash(str(etag_basis))}"
+
+    return response
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>/edit", methods=["GET"])
+@handle_property_errors
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@validate_property_id
+@require_property_exists
+@log_property_operation("load_property_edit_form")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def edit_property(property_id, property_obj):
+    """Get property edit form for modal with enhanced error handling"""
+    
+    # Create form with current property data and safe attribute access
+    form = PropertyEditForm(property_id=property_id)
+    
+    # Populate form fields with safe fallbacks
+    form.title.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "title", "") or ""
+    form.address.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "address", "") or ""
+    form.property_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_type", "house") or "house"
+    form.bedrooms.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "bedrooms", 0) or 0
+    form.bathrooms.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "bathrooms", 0) or 0
+    form.square_feet.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "square_feet", 0) or 0
+    form.description.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "description", "") or ""
+    form.year_built.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "year_built", None)
+    form.parking_spaces.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "parking_spaces", 0) or 0
+    form.floors.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "floors", 1) or 1
+    form.units.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "units", 1) or 1
+    form.property_condition.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_condition", "good") or "good"
+    form.heating_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "heating_type", "") or ""
+    form.cooling_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "cooling_type", "") or ""
+    form.neighborhood.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "neighborhood", "") or ""
+    form.property_category.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_category", "residential") or "residential"
+    listing_type = _safe_attr(property_obj, "listing_type", "sale") or "sale"
+    form.listing_type.data = listing_type if listing_type in ["sale", "rental"] else "sale"
+    form.property_features.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_features", "") or ""
+    form.agent_id.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "agent_id", None)
+    form.document_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "document_type", None)
+    form.floor_number.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_number", None)
+    form.built_area.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "built_area", None)
+    form.land_area.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "land_area", None)
+    form.floor_covering.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_covering", None)
+    form.facade_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "facade_type", None)
+    form.wall_covering.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "wall_covering", None)
+    form.cabinet_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "cabinet_type", None)
+    form.property_direction.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_direction", None)
+    form.is_exchangeable.data = bool(_safe_attr(property_obj, "is_exchangeable", False))
+    form.boundary_width.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "boundary_width", None)
+    form.density.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "density", None)
+    form.commercial_status.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "commercial_status", None)
+    form.usage_type.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "usage_type", None)
+    form.ceiling_count.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "ceiling_count", None)
+    form.permit_ceiling.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "permit_ceiling", None)
+    form.property_length.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_length", None)
+    form.property_height.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_height", None)
+    form.price_per_meter.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "price_per_meter", None)
+    form.custom_fields.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "custom_fields", "") or ""
+    
+    # Set pricing fields based on listing type
+    if form.listing_type.data == "sale":
+        form.sale_price.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "price", 0) or 0
+    else:
+        form.rahn.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "rahn", None)
+        form.ejare.data = _safe_attr(property_obj, "ejare", None)
+
+    property_data = _serialize_property_for_json(property_obj)
+
+    if _wants_json():
+        return jsonify({"property": property_data}), 200
+
+    # Fetch AI history
+    history = database_service.get_ai_history(property_id)
+
+    return render_template(
+        "modals/property_edit_modal.html",
+        property=property_obj,
+        form=form,
+        history=history,
+        # Maskan field constants
+        maskan_property_types=MASKAN_PROPERTY_TYPES,
+        document_types=DOCUMENT_TYPES,
+        wall_coverings=WALL_COVERINGS,
+        cabinet_types=CABINET_TYPES,
+        cooling_systems=COOLING_SYSTEMS,
+        heating_systems=HEATING_SYSTEMS,
+        flooring_types=FLOORING_TYPES,
+        facade_types=FACADE_TYPES,
+        directions=DIRECTIONS,
+        maskan_features=MASKAN_FEATURES,
+    )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/v1/properties/<int:property_id>/edit-modal-html", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def get_edit_modal_html(property_id):
+    """Compatibility endpoint for lazy-loaded edit modal content."""
+    return edit_property(property_id)
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>", methods=["PUT", "POST"])
+@handle_property_errors
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@validate_property_id
+@require_property_exists
+@validate_property_data(
+    required_fields=['title', 'address', 'property_type'],
+    optional_fields=['bedrooms', 'bathrooms', 'square_feet', 'description', 'year_built']
+)
+@log_property_operation("update_property")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_property(property_id, property_obj):
+    """Update property data with comprehensive validation and error handling"""
+
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _required_text(field_name):
+        value = (request.form.get(field_name) or "").strip()
+        if not value:
+            raise PropertyValidationError(f"{field_name.replace('_', ' ').title()} is required")
+        return value
+
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _parse_optional_number(raw_value, field_label):
+        normalized = _normalize_numeric_input(raw_value)
+        if normalized in (None, ""):
+            return None
+        try:
+            return float(normalized)
+        except (ValueError, TypeError):
+            raise PropertyValidationError(f"Invalid pricing data: {field_label} must be a valid number")
+
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _parse_optional_int(raw_value, field_label, min_value=None, max_value=None):
+        normalized = _normalize_numeric_input(raw_value)
+        if normalized in (None, ""):
+            return None
+        try:
+            value = int(normalized)
+        except (ValueError, TypeError):
+            raise PropertyValidationError(f"Invalid numeric data: {field_label} must be a valid number")
+        if min_value is not None and value < min_value:
+            raise PropertyValidationError(f"{field_label} must be at least {min_value}")
+        if max_value is not None and value > max_value:
+            raise PropertyValidationError(f"{field_label} must be at most {max_value}")
+        return value
+
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _parse_int_field(field_name, default=0, min_value=None, max_value=None):
+        raw_value = _normalize_numeric_input(request.form.get(field_name))
+        if raw_value in (None, ""):
+            value = default
+        else:
+            try:
+                value = int(raw_value)
+            except (ValueError, TypeError):
+                raise PropertyValidationError(
+                    f"Invalid numeric data: {field_name.replace('_', ' ')} must be a valid number"
+                )
+
+        if min_value is not None and value < min_value:
+            raise PropertyValidationError(
+                f"{field_name.replace('_', ' ').title()} must be between {min_value} and {max_value}"
+                if max_value is not None
+                else f"{field_name.replace('_', ' ').title()} must be at least {min_value}"
+            )
+        if max_value is not None and value > max_value:
+            raise PropertyValidationError(
+                f"{field_name.replace('_', ' ').title()} must be between {min_value} and {max_value}"
+            )
+        return value
+
+    title = _required_text("title")
+    address = _required_text("address")
+    property_type = _required_text("property_type")
+    description = (request.form.get("description") or "").strip()
+    neighborhood = (request.form.get("neighborhood") or "").strip()
+    property_features = (request.form.get("property_features") or "").strip()
+    property_condition = (request.form.get("property_condition") or "good").strip() or "good"
+    property_category = (request.form.get("property_category") or "residential").strip() or "residential"
+    listing_type = (request.form.get("listing_type") or "sale").strip().lower()
+
+    if listing_type not in ["sale", "rental"]:
+        raise PropertyValidationError("Listing type must be either sale or rental")
+
+    price = 0
+    rahn = None
+    ejare = None
+
+    if listing_type == "sale":
+        raw_sale_price = (request.form.get("sale_price") or "").strip()
+        if not raw_sale_price:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Sale price is required for sale listings")
+        price = _parse_optional_toman(raw_sale_price, "sale price") or 0
+        if price <= 0:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Sale price must be greater than zero")
+    else:
+        rahn = _parse_optional_toman((request.form.get("rahn") or "").strip(), "rahn")
+        ejare = _parse_optional_toman((request.form.get("ejare") or "").strip(), "ejare")
+        if rahn is None and ejare is None:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Either Rahn or Ejare is required for rental listings")
+        if rahn is not None and rahn < 0:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Rahn amount cannot be negative")
+        if ejare is not None and ejare <= 0:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Ejare amount must be greater than zero")
+
+    bedrooms = _parse_int_field("bedrooms", default=0, min_value=0, max_value=50)
+    bathrooms = _parse_int_field("bathrooms", default=0, min_value=0, max_value=50)
+    square_feet = _parse_int_field("square_feet", default=0, min_value=0, max_value=1000000)
+    parking_spaces = _parse_int_field("parking_spaces", default=0, min_value=0, max_value=100)
+    floors = _parse_int_field("floors", default=1, min_value=1, max_value=200)
+    units = _parse_int_field("units", default=1, min_value=1, max_value=10000)
+
+    raw_year_built = _normalize_numeric_input(request.form.get("year_built"))
+    if raw_year_built:
+        try:
+            year_built = int(raw_year_built)
+        except (ValueError, TypeError):
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Invalid numeric data: year built must be a valid number")
+        if year_built < 1800 or year_built > 2030:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Year built must be between 1800 and 2030")
+    else:
+        year_built = None
+
+    raw_agent_id = _normalize_numeric_input(request.form.get("agent_id"))
+    if raw_agent_id:
+        try:
+            agent_id = int(raw_agent_id)
+        except (ValueError, TypeError):
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Invalid numeric data: agent id must be a valid number")
+        if agent_id <= 0:
+            raise PropertyValidationError("Agent ID must be a positive number")
+    else:
+        agent_id = None
+
+    @log_execution
+    @log_execution
+    def _optional_text_or_existing(field_name):
+        raw_value = request.form.get(field_name)
+        if raw_value is None:
+            return _safe_attr(property_obj, field_name, None)
+        text_value = raw_value.strip()
+        return text_value or None
+
+    raw_exchangeable = request.form.get("is_exchangeable")
+    if raw_exchangeable is None:
+        is_exchangeable = bool(_safe_attr(property_obj, "is_exchangeable", False))
+    else:
+        is_exchangeable = str(raw_exchangeable).strip().lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
+
+    raw_floor_number = request.form.get("floor_number")
+    floor_number = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "floor_number", None)
+        if raw_floor_number is None
+        else _parse_optional_int((raw_floor_number or "").strip(), "floor number", min_value=-10, max_value=300)
+    )
+    raw_built_area = request.form.get("built_area")
+    built_area = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "built_area", None)
+        if raw_built_area is None
+        else _parse_optional_int((raw_built_area or "").strip(), "built area", min_value=0, max_value=10000000)
+    )
+    raw_land_area = request.form.get("land_area")
+    land_area = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "land_area", None)
+        if raw_land_area is None
+        else _parse_optional_int((raw_land_area or "").strip(), "land area", min_value=0, max_value=10000000)
+    )
+    raw_boundary_width = request.form.get("boundary_width")
+    boundary_width = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "boundary_width", None)
+        if raw_boundary_width is None
+        else _parse_optional_number((raw_boundary_width or "").strip(), "boundary width")
+    )
+    raw_ceiling_count = request.form.get("ceiling_count")
+    ceiling_count = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "ceiling_count", None)
+        if raw_ceiling_count is None
+        else _parse_optional_int((raw_ceiling_count or "").strip(), "ceiling count", min_value=0, max_value=500)
+    )
+    raw_property_length = request.form.get("property_length")
+    property_length = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_length", None)
+        if raw_property_length is None
+        else _parse_optional_number((raw_property_length or "").strip(), "property length")
+    )
+    raw_property_height = request.form.get("property_height")
+    property_height = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "property_height", None)
+        if raw_property_height is None
+        else _parse_optional_number((raw_property_height or "").strip(), "property height")
+    )
+    raw_price_per_meter = request.form.get("price_per_meter")
+    price_per_meter = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "price_per_meter", None)
+        if raw_price_per_meter is None
+        else _parse_optional_toman((raw_price_per_meter or "").strip(), "price per meter")
+    )
+
+    raw_latitude = request.form.get("latitude")
+    latitude = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "latitude", None)
+        if raw_latitude is None
+        else _parse_optional_number((raw_latitude or "").strip(), "latitude")
+    )
+    raw_longitude = request.form.get("longitude")
+    longitude = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "longitude", None)
+        if raw_longitude is None
+        else _parse_optional_number((raw_longitude or "").strip(), "longitude")
+    )
+
+    raw_custom_fields = request.form.get("custom_fields")
+    custom_fields = (
+        _safe_attr(property_obj, "custom_fields", "") or ""
+        if raw_custom_fields is None
+        else (raw_custom_fields or "").strip()
+    )
+
+    document_type = _optional_text_or_existing("document_type")
+    floor_covering = _optional_text_or_existing("floor_covering")
+    facade_type = _optional_text_or_existing("facade_type")
+    wall_covering = _optional_text_or_existing("wall_covering")
+    cabinet_type = _optional_text_or_existing("cabinet_type")
+    property_direction = _optional_text_or_existing("property_direction")
+    density = _optional_text_or_existing("density")
+    commercial_status = _optional_text_or_existing("commercial_status")
+    usage_type = _optional_text_or_existing("usage_type")
+    permit_ceiling = _optional_text_or_existing("permit_ceiling")
+    heating_type = _optional_text_or_existing("heating_type") or ""
+    cooling_type = _optional_text_or_existing("cooling_type") or ""
+
+    try:
+        updated_property = database_service.update_property(
+            property_id,
+            title=title,
+            address=address,
+            price=price,
+            property_type=property_type,
+            bedrooms=bedrooms,
+            bathrooms=bathrooms,
+            square_feet=square_feet,
+            description=description,
+            year_built=year_built,
+            parking_spaces=parking_spaces,
+            floors=floors,
+            units=units,
+            property_condition=property_condition,
+            heating_type=heating_type,
+            cooling_type=cooling_type,
+            neighborhood=neighborhood,
+            property_category=property_category,
+            listing_type=listing_type,
+            rahn=rahn,
+            ejare=ejare,
+            property_features=property_features,
+            agent_id=agent_id,
+            document_type=document_type,
+            floor_number=floor_number,
+            built_area=built_area,
+            land_area=land_area,
+            floor_covering=floor_covering,
+            facade_type=facade_type,
+            wall_covering=wall_covering,
+            cabinet_type=cabinet_type,
+            property_direction=property_direction,
+            is_exchangeable=is_exchangeable,
+            boundary_width=boundary_width,
+            density=density,
+            commercial_status=commercial_status,
+            usage_type=usage_type,
+            ceiling_count=ceiling_count,
+            permit_ceiling=permit_ceiling,
+            property_length=property_length,
+            property_height=property_height,
+            price_per_meter=price_per_meter,
+            latitude=latitude,
+            longitude=longitude,
+            custom_fields=custom_fields,
+        )
+        if not updated_property:
+            raise PropertyOperationError("Failed to update property - no changes made")
+    except Exception as e:
+        if isinstance(e, (PropertyValidationError, PropertyOperationError)):
+            raise
+        logging.error(f"Database error updating property {property_id}: {str(e)}")
+        raise PropertyOperationError(f"Failed to update property: {str(e)}")
+
+    image_file = request.files.get("image")
+    if image_file and image_file.filename:
+        try:
+            filename = secure_filename(image_file.filename)
+            upload_folder = os.path.join(current_app.root_path, "static", "uploads")
+            os.makedirs(upload_folder, exist_ok=True)
+            image_file.save(os.path.join(upload_folder, filename))
+            database_service.update_property(property_id, image_filename=filename)
+        except Exception as e:
+            logging.error(f"Error uploading image for property {property_id}: {str(e)}")
+            flash(f"Property updated but image upload failed: {str(e)}", "warning")
+
+    # Save AI history if available
+    ai_raw_data = request.form.get("ai_raw_data")
+    if ai_raw_data:
+        database_service.add_ai_history(
+            property_id=property_id,
+            raw_data=ai_raw_data,
+            user_note="Update extraction"
+        )
+
+    success_msg = f'Property "{_safe_attr(updated_property, "title", "Unknown Property")}" updated successfully!'
+    property_data = _serialize_property_for_json(updated_property)
+
+    if _wants_json():
+        return jsonify({"property": property_data, "message": success_msg}), 200
+
+    flash(success_msg, "success")
+    return redirect(url_for("properties.properties"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@handle_database_error
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_property(property_id):
+    """Delete property"""
+    try:
+        property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+        if not property_obj:
+            if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+                return safe_json_response(message='Property not found', status=404)
+            flash('Property not found', 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+        
+        property_title = property_obj.title
+        
+        # Check if property has active deals
+        active_deals = [d for d in property_obj.deals if d.status not in ["closed_won", "closed_lost"]] if hasattr(property_obj, 'deals') else []
+        if active_deals:
+            error_msg = f'Cannot delete property "{property_title}" - it has {len(active_deals)} active deal(s). Please close or reassign deals first.'
+            if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+                return safe_json_response(message=error_msg, status=400)
+            flash(error_msg, 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+        
+        # Delete property
+        success = database_service.delete_property(property_id)
+        if not success:
+            error_msg = 'Failed to delete property'
+            if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+                return safe_json_response(message=error_msg, status=500)
+            flash(error_msg, 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+        
+        success_msg = f'Property "{property_title}" deleted successfully!'
+        
+        if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+            return safe_json_response(message=success_msg)
+        
+        flash(success_msg, 'success')
+        return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error deleting property")
+        error_msg = f"Error deleting property: {str(e)}"
+        
+        if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+            return safe_json_response(message=error_msg, status=500)
+        
+        flash(error_msg, "error")
+        return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/<int:property_id>/share", methods=["GET"])
+@handle_database_error
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def share_property(property_id):
+    """Get property sharing options"""
+    try:
+        property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+        if not property_obj:
+            if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+                return safe_json_response(message='Property not found', status=404)
+            flash('Property not found', 'error')
+            return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+        
+        # Generate sharing data
+        property_url = request.url_root.rstrip('/') + url_for('properties.view_property', property_id=property_id)
+        sharing_data = {
+            'property_id': property_id,
+            'title': property_obj.title,
+            'address': property_obj.address,
+            'price': property_obj.price,
+            'url': property_url,
+            'description': f"{property_obj.title} - {property_obj.address}. ${property_obj.price:,.0f}"
+        }
+        
+        if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+            return safe_json_response(data={'sharing': sharing_data})
+        
+        return render_template("modals/property_share_modal.html", sharing=sharing_data)
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error loading property sharing")
+        if request.is_json or request.headers.get('X-Requested-With') == 'XMLHttpRequest':
+            return safe_json_response(message=str(e), status=500)
+        flash(f'Error loading property sharing: {str(e)}', 'error')
+        return redirect(url_for('properties.properties'))
+
+
+@bp.route("/properties/compare")
+@log_property_operation("compare_properties")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def compare_properties():
+    """Compare multiple properties side-by-side"""
+    ids_str = request.args.get("ids", "")
+    properties = []
+    
+    if ids_str:
+        try:
+            # Parse IDs from comma-separated string
+            ids = [int(id_str) for id_str in ids_str.split(",") if id_str.strip().isdigit()]
+            
+            # Fetch properties (limit to 3 for UI consistency)
+            for p_id in ids[:3]:
+                prop = database_service.get_property(p_id)
+                if prop:
+                    properties.append(prop)
+                    
+        except Exception as e:
+            logging.error(f"Error preparing comparison: {str(e)}")
+            flash("Error loading properties for comparison", "error")
+    
+    return render_template("compare_properties.html", properties=properties)
+
+
+# ============================================================================
+# FAVORITES API ENDPOINTS
+# ============================================================================
+
+@bp.route("/api/properties/<int:property_id>/favorite", methods=["POST"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=20, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_property_errors
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@validate_property_id
+@require_property_exists
+@log_property_operation("add_favorite")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def add_property_favorite(property_id, property_obj):
+    """Add a property to favorites via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get optional parameters from request
+        data = request.get_json() if request.is_json else {}
+        user_id = data.get('user_id')  # Future user system
+        category = data.get('category')
+        notes = data.get('notes')
+        
+        # Validate category if provided
+        valid_categories = ["potential_buy", "investment", "watch_list", "dream_home", "comparison"]
+        if category and category not in valid_categories:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message=f"Invalid category. Valid options: {', '.join(valid_categories)}",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        # Check if already favorited
+        if favorites_service.is_favorited(property_id, user_id):
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Property is already in favorites",
+                status=409,
+                data={
+                    'property_id': property_id,
+                    'is_favorited': True
+                }
+            )
+        
+        # Add to favorites
+        favorite = favorites_service.add_favorite(
+            property_id=property_id,
+            user_id=user_id,
+            category=category,
+            notes=notes
+        )
+        
+        # Build response data
+        response_data = {
+            'favorite_id': favorite.id,
+            'property_id': property_id,
+            'property_title': property_obj.title,
+            'category': favorite.category,
+            'notes': favorite.notes,
+            'created_at': favorite.created_at.isoformat() if favorite.created_at else None,
+            'is_favorited': True,
+            'favorites_count': favorites_service.get_favorites_count(property_id)
+        }
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=f"Property '{property_obj.title}' added to favorites",
+            data=response_data,
+            status=201
+        )
+        
+    except ValueError as e:
+        return safe_json_response(message=str(e), status=400)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception(f"Error adding property {property_id} to favorites")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to add property to favorites",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/properties/<int:property_id>/favorite", methods=["DELETE"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=20, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_property_errors
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@validate_property_id
+@log_property_operation("remove_favorite")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def remove_property_favorite(property_id):
+    """Remove a property from favorites via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get optional parameters from request
+        data = request.get_json() if request.is_json else {}
+        user_id = data.get('user_id')  # Future user system
+        
+        # Check if favorited
+        if not favorites_service.is_favorited(property_id, user_id):
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Property is not in favorites",
+                status=404,
+                data={
+                    'property_id': property_id,
+                    'is_favorited': False
+                }
+            )
+        
+        # Remove from favorites
+        removed = favorites_service.remove_favorite(
+            property_id=property_id,
+            user_id=user_id
+        )
+        
+        if not removed:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Failed to remove property from favorites",
+                status=500
+            )
+        
+        # Get property title for response
+        property_obj = database_service.get_property(property_id)
+        property_title = property_obj.title if property_obj else "Unknown Property"
+        
+        # Build response data
+        response_data = {
+            'property_id': property_id,
+            'property_title': property_title,
+            'is_favorited': False,
+            'favorites_count': favorites_service.get_favorites_count(property_id)
+        }
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=f"Property '{property_title}' removed from favorites",
+            data=response_data
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception(f"Error removing property {property_id} from favorites")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to remove property from favorites",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/favorites", methods=["GET"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=30, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@log_property_operation("list_favorites")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def list_user_favorites():
+    """Get user's favorite properties via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get query parameters
+        user_id = request.args.get('user_id', type=int)  # Future user system
+        category = request.args.get('category')
+        sort_by = request.args.get('sort_by', 'created_at')
+        sort_order = request.args.get('sort_order', 'desc')
+        limit = request.args.get('limit', type=int)
+        include_details = request.args.get('include_details', 'true').lower() == 'true'
+        
+        # Validate sort parameters
+        valid_sort_fields = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'property_title']
+        if sort_by not in valid_sort_fields:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message=f"Invalid sort_by field. Valid options: {', '.join(valid_sort_fields)}",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        valid_sort_orders = ['asc', 'desc']
+        if sort_order not in valid_sort_orders:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message=f"Invalid sort_order. Valid options: {', '.join(valid_sort_orders)}",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        # Validate limit
+        if limit is not None and (limit < 1 or limit > 100):
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Limit must be between 1 and 100",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        # Get favorites
+        favorites = favorites_service.get_user_favorites(
+            user_id=user_id,
+            category=category,
+            include_property_details=include_details,
+            sort_by=sort_by,
+            sort_order=sort_order,
+            limit=limit
+        )
+        
+        # Build response data
+        favorites_data = []
+        for favorite in favorites:
+            favorite_data = {
+                'id': favorite.id,
+                'property_id': favorite.property_id,
+                'category': favorite.category,
+                'notes': favorite.notes,
+                'created_at': favorite.created_at.isoformat() if favorite.created_at else None,
+                'updated_at': favorite.updated_at.isoformat() if favorite.updated_at else None
+            }
+            
+            # Include property details if requested and available
+            if include_details and favorite.property:
+                prop = favorite.property
+                favorite_data['property'] = {
+                    'id': prop.id,
+                    'title': prop.title,
+                    'address': prop.address,
+                    'price': prop.price,
+                    'property_type': prop.property_type,
+                    'bedrooms': prop.bedrooms,
+                    'bathrooms': prop.bathrooms,
+                    'square_feet': prop.square_feet,
+                    'status': prop.status,
+                    'listing_type': prop.listing_type,
+                    'neighborhood': prop.neighborhood,
+                    'property_condition': prop.property_condition,
+                    'agent_name': prop.agent.name if prop.agent else None,
+                    'rahn': prop.rahn,
+                    'ejare': prop.ejare
+                }
+            
+            favorites_data.append(favorite_data)
+        
+        # Get summary statistics
+        total_favorites = favorites_service.get_favorites_count(user_id=user_id)
+        categories = favorites_service.get_user_favorite_categories(user_id=user_id)
+        
+        response_data = {
+            'favorites': favorites_data,
+            'total_count': total_favorites,
+            'returned_count': len(favorites_data),
+            'categories': categories,
+            'filters': {
+                'user_id': user_id,
+                'category': category,
+                'sort_by': sort_by,
+                'sort_order': sort_order,
+                'limit': limit
+            }
+        }
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=f"Retrieved {len(favorites_data)} favorites",
+            data=response_data
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving user favorites")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to retrieve favorites",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/favorites/<int:favorite_id>", methods=["PUT"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=15, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@log_property_operation("update_favorite")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_favorite(favorite_id):
+    """Update a favorite's category or notes via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get request data
+        data = request.get_json()
+        if not data:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Request body must contain JSON data",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        category = data.get('category')
+        notes = data.get('notes')
+        
+        # Validate category if provided
+        if category is not None:
+            valid_categories = ["potential_buy", "investment", "watch_list", "dream_home", "comparison"]
+            if category and category not in valid_categories:
+                return safe_json_response(
+                    message=f"Invalid category. Valid options: {', '.join(valid_categories)}",
+                    status=400
+                )
+        
+        # Update favorite
+        favorite = favorites_service.update_favorite(
+            favorite_id=favorite_id,
+            category=category,
+            notes=notes
+        )
+        
+        if not favorite:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Favorite not found",
+                status=404
+            )
+        
+        # Build response data
+        response_data = {
+            'id': favorite.id,
+            'property_id': favorite.property_id,
+            'property_title': favorite.property.title if favorite.property else None,
+            'category': favorite.category,
+            'notes': favorite.notes,
+            'created_at': favorite.created_at.isoformat() if favorite.created_at else None,
+            'updated_at': favorite.updated_at.isoformat() if favorite.updated_at else None
+        }
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Favorite updated successfully",
+            data=response_data
+        )
+        
+    except ValueError as e:
+        return safe_json_response(message=str(e), status=404)
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception(f"Error updating favorite {favorite_id}")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to update favorite",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/favorites/<int:favorite_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=15, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@log_property_operation("delete_favorite")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_favorite(favorite_id):
+    """Delete a specific favorite via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get optional user_id for validation
+        data = request.get_json() if request.is_json else {}
+        user_id = data.get('user_id')
+        
+        # Get favorite details before deletion
+        favorite = favorites_service.get_favorite_by_id(favorite_id)
+        if not favorite:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Favorite not found",
+                status=404
+            )
+        
+        # Optional user validation
+        if user_id is not None and favorite.user_id != user_id:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Not authorized to delete this favorite",
+                status=403
+            )
+        
+        property_title = favorite.property.title if favorite.property else "Unknown Property"
+        
+        # Remove favorite
+        removed = favorites_service.remove_favorite(favorite_id=favorite_id)
+        
+        if not removed:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Failed to delete favorite",
+                status=500
+            )
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=f"Favorite for '{property_title}' deleted successfully",
+            data={
+                'deleted_favorite_id': favorite_id,
+                'property_title': property_title
+            }
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception(f"Error deleting favorite {favorite_id}")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to delete favorite",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/favorites/bulk-delete", methods=["DELETE"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=5, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@log_property_operation("bulk_delete_favorites")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def bulk_delete_favorites():
+    """Delete multiple favorites via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get request data
+        data = request.get_json()
+        if not data:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Request body must contain JSON data",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        favorite_ids = data.get('favorite_ids', [])
+        user_id = data.get('user_id')  # Optional user validation
+        
+        # Validate favorite_ids
+        if not isinstance(favorite_ids, list) or not favorite_ids:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="favorite_ids must be a non-empty list",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        if len(favorite_ids) > 50:
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="Cannot delete more than 50 favorites at once",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        # Validate all IDs are integers
+        try:
+            favorite_ids = [int(fid) for fid in favorite_ids]
+        except (ValueError, TypeError):
+            return safe_json_response(
+                message="All favorite_ids must be valid integers",
+                status=400
+            )
+        
+        # Perform bulk deletion
+        results = favorites_service.bulk_remove_favorites(
+            favorite_ids=favorite_ids,
+            user_id=user_id
+        )
+        
+        # Determine response status
+        status_code = 200
+        if results['total_failed'] > 0 and results['total_removed'] == 0:
+            status_code = 400  # All failed
+        elif results['total_failed'] > 0:
+            status_code = 207  # Partial success
+        
+        message = f"Bulk delete completed: {results['total_removed']} removed, {results['total_failed']} failed"
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=message,
+            data=results,
+            status=status_code
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error in bulk delete favorites")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to perform bulk delete",
+            status=500
+        )
+
+

+        logging.exception(f"Error checking favorite status for property {property_id}")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to check favorite status",
+            status=500
+        )

+@bp.route("/api/favorites/statistics", methods=["GET"])
+@rate_limit(max_requests=10, window_minutes=1)
+@handle_database_connection_error
+@log_property_operation("get_favorites_statistics")
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def get_favorites_statistics():
+    """Get comprehensive favorites statistics via API"""
+    try:
+        # Get optional user_id parameter
+        user_id = request.args.get('user_id', type=int)
+        
+        # Get statistics
+        stats = favorites_service.get_favorites_statistics(user_id)
+        
+        # Get popular properties (global only)
+        popular_properties = []
+        if user_id is None:
+            popular = favorites_service.get_popular_properties(limit=5)
+            for item in popular:
+                prop = item['property']
+                popular_properties.append({
+                    'property_id': prop.id,
+                    'title': prop.title,
+                    'address': prop.address,
+                    'price': prop.price,
+                    'favorites_count': item['favorites_count']
+                })
+        
+        response_data = {
+            'statistics': stats,
+            'popular_properties': popular_properties,
+            'user_id': user_id
+        }
+        
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Favorites statistics retrieved",
+            data=response_data
+        )
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving favorites statistics")
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message="Failed to retrieve favorites statistics",
+            status=500
+        )

+# ── Sync Integration Endpoints ──
+
+@bp.route("/api/properties/<int:property_id>/changelog", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def property_changelog(property_id):
+    """Get field-level change history for a property.
+
+    Query params:
+        change_source: filter by 'sync', 'manual', or 'rollback'
+        page: page number (default 1)
+        per_page: items per page (default 50, max 200)
+    """
+    try:
+        prop = Property.query.get(property_id)
+        if not prop or prop.is_deleted:
+            return safe_json_response(message="Property not found", status=404)
+
+        query = PropertyActivityLog.query.filter_by(property_id=property_id)
+
+        change_source = request.args.get("change_source")
+        if change_source:
+            query = query.filter(PropertyActivityLog.change_source == change_source)
+
+        query = query.order_by(PropertyActivityLog.created_at.desc())
+
+        page = request.args.get("page", default=1, type=int)
+        per_page = min(request.args.get("per_page", default=50, type=int), 200)
+        pagination = query.paginate(page=page, per_page=per_page, error_out=False)
+
+        return safe_json_response(data={
+            "property_id": property_id,
+            "changelog": [log.to_dict() for log in pagination.items],
+            "total": pagination.total,
+            "page": page,
+            "per_page": per_page,
+            "pages": pagination.pages,
+        })
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving changelog for property %s", property_id)
+        return safe_json_response(message=f"Failed to retrieve changelog: {str(e)}", status=500)
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/properties/<int:property_id>/rollback", methods=["POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def rollback_property_field(property_id):
+    """Rollback a specific field on a property to a previous value.
+
+    JSON body:
+        changelog_id: ID of the PropertyActivityLog entry to rollback to
+    """
+    try:
+        prop = Property.query.get(property_id)
+        if not prop or prop.is_deleted:
+            return safe_json_response(message="Property not found", status=404)
+
+        data = request.get_json(silent=True) or {}
+        changelog_id = data.get("changelog_id")
+        if not changelog_id:
+            return safe_json_response(message="changelog_id is required", status=400)
+
+        log_entry = PropertyActivityLog.query.get(changelog_id)
+        if not log_entry or log_entry.property_id != property_id:
+            return safe_json_response(message="Changelog entry not found for this property", status=404)
+
+        # Extract field name from the action (e.g. "price_changed" -> "price")
+        field_name = log_entry.action.replace("_changed", "")
+        if not hasattr(prop, field_name):
+            return safe_json_response(message=f"Unknown field: {field_name}", status=400)
+
+        current_value = getattr(prop, field_name)
+        restore_value = log_entry.old_value
+
+        # Type-cast the restore value to match the field type
+        if restore_value is not None:
+            field_type = type(current_value) if current_value is not None else str
+            try:
+                if field_type in (int,):
+                    restore_value = int(restore_value)
+                elif field_type in (float,):
+                    restore_value = float(restore_value)
+                elif field_type in (bool,):
+                    restore_value = restore_value.lower() in ("true", "1", "yes")
+            except (ValueError, TypeError):
+                pass  # leave as string
+
+        # Apply rollback
+        setattr(prop, field_name, restore_value)
+
+        # Log the rollback
+        db.session.add(PropertyActivityLog(
+            property_id=property_id,
+            action=f"{field_name}_changed",
+            description=f"Rollback {field_name} to value from changelog #{changelog_id}",
+            old_value=str(current_value) if current_value is not None else None,
+            new_value=str(restore_value) if restore_value is not None else None,
+            change_source="rollback",
+            changed_by="user",
+        ))
+
+        db.session.commit()
+
+        return safe_json_response(
+            message=f"Successfully rolled back {field_name}",
+            data={
+                "field": field_name,
+                "old_value": str(current_value) if current_value is not None else None,
+                "restored_value": str(restore_value) if restore_value is not None else None,
+            }
+        )
+    except Exception as e:
+        db.session.rollback()
+        logging.exception("Error rolling back field for property %s", property_id)
+        return safe_json_response(message=f"Rollback failed: {str(e)}", status=500)
+
+
+@bp.route("/api/sync/status", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def sync_status():
+    """Get sync run history, current status, and Maskan API connection health.
+
+    Query params:
+        limit: number of recent sync records to return (default 10, max 50)
+    """
+    try:
+        limit = min(request.args.get("limit", default=10, type=int), 50)
+        records = (
+            SyncState.query
+            .order_by(SyncState.id.desc())
+            .limit(limit)
+            .all()
+        )
+
+        latest = records[0] if records else None
+
+        # ── Connection check ──
+        from services.maskan_live_service import MaskanLiveService
+        svc = MaskanLiveService()
+        connection = {"configured": svc.is_enabled, "reachable": False, "base_url": svc.base_url or None, "error": None}
+        if svc.is_enabled:
+            try:
+                svc.health()
+                connection["reachable"] = True
+            except Exception as hx:
+                connection["error"] = str(hx)
+
+        return safe_json_response(data={
+            "latest": latest.to_dict() if latest else None,
+            "history": [r.to_dict() for r in records],
+            "total_runs": SyncState.query.count(),
+            "connection": connection,
+        })
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving sync status")
+        return safe_json_response(message=f"Failed to retrieve sync status: {str(e)}", status=500)

+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _wants_json() -> bool:
+    """Return True when the request explicitly expects JSON."""
+    if request.is_json:
+        return True
+    if request.headers.get("X-Requested-With") == "XMLHttpRequest":
+        return True
+    accept = request.headers.get("Accept", "").lower()
+    if "application/json" in accept:
+        return True
+    return request.args.get("format", "").lower() == "json"
+
+
+
+
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def _is_mobile_view() -> bool:
+    return request.args.get("mobile", "").lower() in {"1", "true", "yes", "on"}
+

+@bp.route("/tasks/<int:task_id>", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def view_task(task_id):
+    """Get task details for viewing modal"""
+    try:
+        task = database_service.get_task(task_id)
+        if not task:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Task not found"}), 404
+            flash("Task not found!", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            task_data = {
+                "id": task.id,
+                "title": task.title,
+                "description": task.description,
+                "priority": task.priority,
+                "status": task.status,
+                "due_date": task.due_date.isoformat() if task.due_date else None,
+                "created_at": task.created_at.isoformat() if task.created_at else None,
+                "completed_at": task.completed_at.isoformat() if task.completed_at else None,
+                "agent_id": task.agent_id,
+            }
+            agent_data = {
+                "id": task.agent.id,
+                "name": task.agent.name,
+                "email": task.agent.email,
+                "specialization": task.agent.specialization,
+            } if task.agent else None
+            return jsonify({"task": task_data, "agent": agent_data})
+
+        return render_template("modals/task_view_modal.html", task=task, current_date=datetime.now())
+            
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error retrieving task")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error retrieving task: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/tasks/<int:task_id>/edit", methods=["GET"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def edit_task_form(task_id):
+    """Get task edit form for modal"""
+    try:
+        task = database_service.get_task(task_id)
+        if not task:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Task not found"}), 404
+            flash("Task not found!", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        
+        # Create form with current task data
+        form = TaskEditForm(obj=task)
+        agents = database_service.get_agents()
+        
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({
+                "task": {
+                    "id": task.id,
+                    "title": task.title,
+                    "description": task.description,
+                    "priority": task.priority,
+                    "status": task.status,
+                    "due_date": task.due_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d') if task.due_date else "",
+                    "agent_id": task.agent_id
+                },
+                "agents": [{"id": agent.id, "name": agent.name, "specialization": agent.specialization} for agent in agents]
+            })
+
+        return render_template("modals/task_edit_modal.html", task=task, form=form, agents=agents, datetime=datetime)
+            
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error loading task edit form")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error loading task edit form: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/tasks/<int:task_id>", methods=["PUT", "POST"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def update_task(task_id):
+    """Update task data"""
+    try:
+        task = database_service.get_task(task_id)
+        if not task:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Task not found"}), 404
+            flash("Task not found!", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        
+        # Handle both PUT and POST methods (some browsers don't support PUT in forms)
+        form = TaskEditForm()
+        if form.validate_on_submit():
+            # Update task with form data
+            update_data = {
+                "title": form.title.data,
+                "description": form.description.data,
+                "priority": form.priority.data,
+                "status": form.status.data,
+                "due_date": form.due_date.data
+            }
+            
+            updated_task = database_service.update_task(task_id, **update_data)
+            
+            if updated_task:
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({
+                        "success": True,
+                        "message": "Task updated successfully",
+                        "task": {
+                            "id": updated_task.id,
+                            "title": updated_task.title,
+                            "description": updated_task.description,
+                            "priority": updated_task.priority,
+                            "status": updated_task.status,
+                            "due_date": updated_task.due_date.isoformat() if updated_task.due_date else None
+                        }
+                    })
+                flash("Task updated successfully!", "success")
+                return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+            else:
+                if _wants_json():
+                    return jsonify({"error": "Failed to update task"}), 500
+                flash("Failed to update task!", "error")
+                return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        else:
+            # Form validation failed
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Validation failed", "errors": form.errors}), 400
+            
+            # Re-render form with errors
+            agents = database_service.get_agents()
+            return render_template("modals/task_edit_modal.html", task=task, form=form, agents=agents, datetime=datetime)
+            
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error updating task")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error updating task: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+
+
+@bp.route("/tasks/<int:task_id>", methods=["DELETE"])
+@log_execution
+@log_execution
+def delete_task(task_id):
+    """Delete a task"""
+    try:
+        task = database_service.get_task(task_id)
+        if not task:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Task not found"}), 404
+            flash("Task not found!", "error")
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        
+        # Store task title for success message
+        task_title = task.title
+        
+        # Delete the task
+        success = database_service.delete_task(task_id)
+        
+        if success:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"success": True, "message": f"Task '{task_title}' deleted successfully"})
+            flash(f"Task '{task_title}' deleted successfully!", "success")
+        else:
+            if _wants_json():
+                return jsonify({"error": "Failed to delete task"}), 500
+            flash("Failed to delete task!", "error")
+        
+        if not _wants_json():
+            return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
+        return jsonify({"success": True, "message": f"Task '{task_title}' deleted successfully"})
+        
+    except Exception as e:
+        logging.exception("Error deleting task")
+        if _wants_json():
+            return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
+        flash(f"Error deleting task: {str(e)}", "error")
+        return redirect(url_for("tasks.tasks"))
